name: Doug Lindner, LCV
subject: (Time Sensitive) Tell the Senate: STOP WAITING. Confirm these judges NOW:
body:
We need your help to reach our goal before time runs out. |
---
| | **
URGENT: TELL THE SENATE TO CONFIRM JUDICIAL NOMINEES _NOW_**
Federal judicial nominees are waiting to be confirmed by the Senate. President Biden's nominees for lifetime judgeships are mostly women, mostly people of color, and mostly public-interest lawyers, unlike any other president. But we need the Senate to confirm them.

Confirming these judges is critical to ensuring that environmental policies are protected and voting rights laws are upheld. This could be the difference between protecting people and the planet versus corporate power and pollution.

[Will you contact your Senator to make sure that pro-democracy, pro-environment judges are confirmed without further delay?](https://links.messages.lcv.)
|
---
**[**TAKE ACTION**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

** **
|
Yesterday, fifteen of President Biden's judicial nominees were passed out of the Judiciary Committee, and they are now headed to the full Senate for confirmation. Other great nominees are still waiting to pass out of committee.

****Peter, the vast majority of these nominations have been pending since the last Congress.**We need the Senate to confirm these judges** -- it is the single most important thing the Senate can do _right now_ to protect democracy and the environment.****

President Biden made a commitment to diversifying federal courts by prioritizing women and people of color more than any other president. He is also nominating public defenders, civil rights lawyers, and others with experience working for the people, not just powerful special interests.

**With a pro-democracy Senate majority, we _can_ get these nominees confirmed.** But we need the Senate to prioritize these important nominations. [Tell your senators: there's no time to delay. Confirm these pro-democracy, pro-environment judges right now >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

**Here are some of the judicial nominees we 're urging the Senate to confirm right away:**
* **Rachel Bloomekatz,** who would become the first public-interest environmental lawyer to serve on a federal court.
* **Dale Ho,** an esteemed civil rights lawyer who has spent his career fighting for voting rights. He has been waiting for his confirmation since 2021.
* **Nancy Abudu,** another leading voting rights lawyer, who would be the first Black woman to serve on a powerful court in the Deep South.
* **Brad Garcia,** who would be the first Latino judge on the DC Circuit -- a court with extraordinary power over environmental protections.
* **Julie Rikelman,** a leading reproductive rights lawyer whose personal experience as a refugee from the Soviet Union led her to a career fighting for individual rights.

**We need judges who reflect our country 's diversity and protect the people's rights instead of attacking them.** These nominees are highly qualified and have proven they understand the importance of a justice system that works for everyone, not just powerful corporate interests.

But nominations are not enough -- the Senate _must_ move to approve these incredible nominees so that they can get to work protecting our rights and our future.

**The time for delay is over -- the Senate must act.** To protect our environment and democracy, senators _must_ prioritize confirming the backlog of highly qualified judicial nominees. [Take action now. Tell your senators to move quickly to confirm pro-democracy, pro-environment judges. The future of our democracy and planet is at stake.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

These confirmations have a direct impact on the future of climate action, voting rights, clean water, and the rights of the people in this country. Thank you for fighting alongside us, Peter.

Onward,

Doug Lindner
Advocacy Director for Judiciary & Democracy
League of Conservation Voters |

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9159709&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY4MDA4NTA5OQS2&spReportId=MTY4MDA4NTA5OQS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9159709&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY4MDA4NTA5OQS2&spReportId=MTY4MDA4NTA5OQS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

With upcoming cases challenging so many things like elections, affirmative action, and maybe even Donald Trump’s corruption – _**we’re worried!**_
**So we need to hear from 10,000 supporters before midnight.**
[**Answer Immediately: Do you approve of the Supreme Court?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/SCOTUS_poll23/?source=VPP_20230203_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=11&akid=6252%2E878179%2ErRr1KP)

## Stories I’m reading...
[Let’s bring greater transparency to foreign influence on policy making ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1c4c695cbc&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Lee Zeldin in Newsweek [Ex ABC Producer Arrested On Child Porn Charges Months After The FBI Raided His Home ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0458967c6d&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Daily Caller [FBI searched the Penn Biden Center in mid-November ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=cf6cc12183&e=f6564bbe3b)— via CBS NewsOdd how this didn’t come out in November. [1 big thing: Biden’s abortion emergency ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a14b814293&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Axios The President is considering calling a public health emergency to help people get abortions. Cathy McMorris for holding this important hearing. COVID aid is exhibit A of what happens when Congress passes bills no one has read. | New episode of “Beyond the Briefing” podcast... The media has shifted the narrative on handling of classified information now that Biden got caught — they falsely peddle the narrative that it’s about classification without knowing what’s even in the documents. I discuss on the latest podcast. | | Congresswoman Ilhan Omar ousted, 'The Squad' freaks out... | Stories I’m reading... — via Lee Zeldin in Newsweek — via Daily Caller — via CBS NewsOdd how this didn’t come out in November. — via Axios The President is considering calling a public health emergency to help people get abortions. — via DC Examiner — via AP NewsDidn’t he say months ago it was over... now it’ll be over in May?— via Andy Puzder in National Review— via WSJThanks to the Commerce Committee Chair Rep. body:
Democrats are going to hate the idea of a level playing field. Just think what they would do if President Biden was treated the same way President Tru

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=8c226858b16d4093b54400bad8c29e82&_e=_TxPatBv6Z3RJyzt37yPYuMAhwV8I893kAGuuaromth7rRAR0Jnz66M9HJHKqk7oAxFse8iGjdKIpDFojkZJ0vDhmKmLX7RSBvLq_79ICgVQ9fJgyZM_riy6nDVBXIC5LZWr9RJrXxDrX7YT7Gw6j4qsKip8UJmbv-oFHwC74fc1Srbklhx_81w_19PtULlAmdowFDnJ-kCHVh6fMFkKss_P-0uXCfsKteVFrcOs4bSkRP_imd_Id1P3CQ1bnrEHa_3YtozzoXP1hj2JwdN-5iyAvAU80P5I087dXfVVR5Q93lUoUVPjs1dlxzahOHsm_pSDv9q9Fg3j3-KAiyqznnpvFVkMo8QUxdZRxmtqmFQjzN0J4-e0dnWs0b2LUwEevpjfDxw3F9PFhVQdUYXleYlnpTlFrP_vF_1mVl7RbLLuPdVlaoUeUPh3E7AMZ64K)
|

Fellow Conservative,

To say that the liberals who controlled the federal government for the past two years are desperately grasping on to power is an understatement. Until a few weeks ago, Republicans didn’t have the tools to hold them accountable. Without the power that comes with being in the majority, the best we could hope for was the truth would somehow break through all the noise created by the Left and their allies in the mainstream media.

Now with Republicans in the majority, we’re determined to make government not only function more effectively but to hold those in power accountable for the actions they take -**legal or illegal** - in service of the American people.

Of course, some will say that Republicans are just using our investigative powers to settle old scores. _**That’s wrong**_. We must ensure every American receives fair and equal treatment under the law. Whether you work deep in the federal bureaucracy, or you’re **President of the United States** , the law should be administered as written and apply equally to all.

As one of our top supporters, we know that you have your finger on America’s pulse more than most, so we’re hoping you can provide some insight on a very important question: **[Do you believe the government treats everyone the same under the rule of law, regardless of social position or economic advantages?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=8c226858b16d4093b54400bad8c29e82&_e=_TxPatBv6Z3RJyzt37yPYuMAhwV8I893kAGuuaromth7rRAR0Jnz66M9HJHKqk7oAxFse8iGjdKIpDFojkZJ0vDhmKmLX7RSBvLq_79ICgVQ9fJgyZM_riy6nDVBXIC5LZWr9RJrXxDrX7YT7Gw6j4qsKip8UJmbv-oFHwC74fc1Srbklhx_81w_19PtULlAmdowFDnJ-kCHVh6fMFkKss_P-0uXCfsKteVFrcOs4bSkRP_imd_Id1P3CQ1bnrEHa_3YtozzoXP1hj2JwdN-5n--0-3FqLMpuvF2wZE0O9jehcIE9H9VIh6H32J3h3A4CaHEjZ8LIE35mMvc2mnbzsYP4Eo86TYx7S_5S2MQ8X9KuvKO2yYDyn1ywKR9GXnlDNVACfxI4qSiaG8cocE5UtUXw0OgpQ7_-QPFJ_IBoVwOVI54fDqrR4rEwgKWE9cF)**
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=8c226858b16d4093b54400bad8c29e82&_e=_TxPatBv6Z3RJyzt37yPYuMAhwV8I893kAGuuaromth7rRAR0Jnz66M9HJHKqk7oAxFse8iGjdKIpDFojkZJ0vDhmKmLX7RSBvLq_79ICgVQ9fJgyZM_riy6nDVBXIC5LZWr9RJrXxDrX7YT7Gw6j4qsKip8UJmbv-oFHwC74fc1Srbklhx_81w_19PtULlAmdowFDnJ-kCHVh6fMFkKss_P-0uXCfsKteVFrcOs4bSkRP_imd_Id1P3CQ1bnrEHa_3YtozzoXP1hj2JwdN-5gXU5B5H3Bi20lLChP1_Haly4H8g99V1kr41QgxlnUrfPUaHJUFwfABDXohNDpytPS0GVFLF68Q9i3DLQ15-GaJWpbtBbsK2qaEGsMqftdubBfoGNV0eth-SvoNYSl10OG3A7VKAkS9MvJ5uxdxnwi_NV2MxCwL0kbZLkgSrauKd)

[**LET US KNOW
IS EVERYEONE TREATED FAIRLY UNDER THE LAW? -> **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=8c226858b16d4093b54400bad8c29e82&_e=_TxPatBv6Z3RJyzt37yPYuMAhwV8I893kAGuuaromth7rRAR0Jnz66M9HJHKqk7oAxFse8iGjdKIpDFojkZJ0vDhmKmLX7RSBvLq_79ICgVQ9fJgyZM_riy6nDVBXIC5LZWr9RJrXxDrX7YT7Gw6j4qsKip8UJmbv-oFHwC74fc1Srbklhx_81w_19PtULlAmdowFDnJ-kCHVh6fMFkKss_P-0uXCfsKteVFrcOs4bSkRP_imd_Id1P3CQ1bnrEHa_3YtozzoXP1hj2JwdN-5pOr4xDce6zp_qGojWClOKqnkMUtM-55jpj0IY3rOvPtL3FKvNq6H9OiZnl4Ui058_flXJJ_PJz2EFDu6L2scBQ_n11dy3tedg4tv5d8c-sJ_mqHyTt9pODdLBF6lnGYOHWQLqVpmx_xBGipN-UWJMu4gBmYzThfZnnBPpGmTHE4)

Democrats are going to hate the idea of a level playing field. Just think what they would do if President Biden was treated the same way President Trump was during last August’s raid over classified documents. You remember the coordinated leaks, the feigned media outrage, the incessant attacks on Trump and his supporters. Many of us asked: where was the FBI raid when classified documents were found in Biden’s possession before last November’s election?
**
I’m glad to say, their game is finally over. **

Fellow Conservative, please let me know what you think about Biden’s mishandling of classified documents. We are asking for your participation today. **[Can we count on you?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=8c226858b16d4093b54400bad8c29e82&_e=_TxPatBv6Z3RJyzt37yPYuMAhwV8I893kAGuuaromth7rRAR0Jnz66M9HJHKqk7oAxFse8iGjdKIpDFojkZJ0vDhmKmLX7RSBvLq_79ICgVQ9fJgyZM_riy6nDVBXIC5LZWr9RJrXxDrX7YT7Gw6j4qsKip8UJmbv-oFHwC74fc1Srbklhx_81w_19PtULlAmdowFDnJ-kCHVh6fMFkKss_P-0uXCfsKteVFrcOs4bSkRP_imd_Id1P3CQ1bnrEHa_3YtozzoXP1hj2JwdN-5iuRzeahYTviwyK3qUBPMUxSfhjLx-hrtOYpkmWsMRrkirMByY_hgMCPjchK5pB1u3q1fV6i13SfKk96HkVjhDOZZktjScqpXRhVRBcMpHHmjRyPVyxKYFAoNXJBnAiFLpou7_2oAbBFnZNth_th9Uedldf9CJrL2kBp2B0aZMV-)**

God Bless,
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=8c226858b16d4093b54400bad8c29e82&_e=_TxPatBv6Z3RJyzt37yPYuMAhwV8I893kAGuuaromth7rRAR0Jnz66M9HJHKqk7oAxFse8iGjdKIpDFojkZJ0vDhmKmLX7RSBvLq_79ICgVQ9fJgyZM_riy6nDVBXIC5LZWr9RJrXxDrX7YT7Gw6j4qsKip8UJmbv-oFHwC74fc1Srbklhx_81w_19PtULlAmdowFDnJ-kCHVh6fMFkKss_P-0uXCfsKteVFrcOs4bSkRP_imd_Id1P3CQ1bnrEHa_3YtozzoXP1hj2JwdN-5vVdBuFiqbBfXZb2AjRUWCHVaSa7_-kS9QBnAHyfnJ-54Xfr2_BqoF8hng4SUJo7A-mTV7qVQ7RvgRY1nbB9Fs0SBWSkrsZE68u2zY3onPVFz7L9AbVNbzWiuDwdBot-gGF1Q05Zop9ESYArngvFRkYGulT7aKZ5Eu7QQWkUCPVz)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Letitia James
subject: This Black History Month:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58248858/390497101/1632462062?refcode=jtk952-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTJlY2VkYS0yNWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUfM76wu5QYK6fZNqw4-f78uIfwYcyFXildQuEyMZks=)
---
| | _Peter, I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black woman elected to statewide office in New York. Now, in honor of Black History Month, I’m asking you to donate so I can keep fighting for New York and protecting our fundamental rights._
---
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58248859/390497102/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk952-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTJlY2VkYS0yNWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUfM76wu5QYK6fZNqw4-f78uIfwYcyFXildQuEyMZks=)
---
Peter, this Black History Month, I wanted to take stock of how far our fight for equality has come – and the obstacles we still face.

For generations, New York was controlled by politicians who were overwhelmingly white, male, and wealthy. These politicians remained loyal to their special interest and ignored families that looked like mine and neighborhoods as diverse as my own. And, like so many other Black Americans before me, I grew up feeling voiceless and powerless.
**When I made history and became the first Black lawmaker ___ever_ to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed to fight every day to ensure that _no_ one would feel as voiceless and powerless as I once did.** And in the four years since I made that promise, we’ve made _real_ progress for working families.

But our work for equality is far from over. Because still, in 2023: Black Americans are **_10 times more likely to die_** by gun homicide than white Americans, Black trans women are **_killed at disproportionately high rates_** , Black women are over three times **_more likely to die_** in pregnancy or postpartum, and Black Americans are facing **_Jim Crow-era barriers to voting._**
Peter, I vow to keep up my fight for equality for as long as it takes – and I hope you’ll stand with me every step of the way. Last year, you helped me make history as the first Black lawmaker ever to be re-elected as New York’s attorney general, but our fight can’t end there.

Right now, I’m up against some of the most powerful and corrupt forces in our nation that want to block our progress, so please: [**Will you chip in $5 or more today so I can continue to fight for justice, equality, and hope?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58248860/390497103/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk952-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTJlY2VkYS0yNWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUfM76wu5QYK6fZNqw4-f78uIfwYcyFXildQuEyMZks=)** **
Thank you for sharing this time with me. Take care of yourself.

Letitia
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58248861/390497104/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk952-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTJlY2VkYS0yNWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUfM76wu5QYK6fZNqw4-f78uIfwYcyFXildQuEyMZks=)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden Docs Scandal Update
body: Taxpayer Waster --- in Haiti. [INSIDE JW] Huge Stash of Joe Biden Papers Still Hidden at the University of Delaware [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=28806&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vbGl2ZS9sQ0pKMU80QmctRT9mZWF0dXJlPXNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] In all the news of classified documents at Joe Biden’s homes and elsewhere, one huge pile of documents has been mostly overlooked by everyone – but not us. We’ve been fighting in court with the University of Delaware for more than two years for access to Biden’s Senate papers housed there. Here’s the latest. We filed a reply brief [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=28797&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdS1kZWwtYmlkZW4tcGFwZXJzLXN1cHJlbWUtY3QtZGUtcmVwbHktNDAyMjAyMi0wMDEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] on behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation in the Supreme Court of Delaware in our appeal of a lower court decision blocking access to Joe Biden’s senate papers. We’re asking for limited discovery, including, at a minimum, deposing a university representative. In July 2020 we filed [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=26437&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy11ZGVsYXdhcmUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] a Delaware Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit after the university denied our April 2020 requests for all of Biden’s Senate records and for records about the preservation and any proposed release of the records, including communications with Biden or his representatives (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. University of Delaware_ [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=28798&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p1ZGljaWFsLXdhdGNoLXYtZGVsYXdhcmUtZG9qLXUtb2YtZGVsYXdhcmUvXV8sXz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM= (No. N20A-07-001)). Earlier this month we filed an appeal brief [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=28733&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tc2VuYXRlLXBhcGVycy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] with the Delaware Supreme Court after the Superior Court sided with the university, finding that the university had met its burden of performing an adequate search for the requested records. That opinion came after the university had submitted a second affidavit from the university’s FOIA official stating that no state funds had been spent on maintaining the documents. In our Supreme Court filing, we argue [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=28799&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdS1kZWwtYmlkZW4tcGFwZXJzLXN1cHJlbWUtY3QtZGUtcmVwbHktNDAyMjAyMi0wMDEvXTo/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz > Despite FOIA’s acknowledgment that “public entities, as > instruments of government, should not have the power to decide what > is good for the public to know,” over the multi-year course of > this FOIA proceeding, the University’s efforts to satisfy its > statutory burden of proof have been parceled out piecemeal, in > minuscule increments, and only in response to court orders, entered > after briefing by Appellants. When the shortcomings of the > University’s effort are noted in briefing, the University calls > “foul.” The University’s umbrage at these proceedings is > misplaced. To date, the FOIA Coordinator’s efforts (and her > recollections of what steps she took) remain untested by cross > examination. Appellants have every right to challenge what they > believe has been a lackluster effort by the University to satisfy > its statutory burden. Separately, in a January 26, 2023, letter [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=28800&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdS1kZWwtYmlkZW4tcGFwZXJzLWdpbmdyaWNoLWxldHRlci00MDIyMDIyLTAwMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] to former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Delaware attorney Ted A. Kittila, who serves as our local counsel, details: > Based on what we have learned, there are 1,850 BOXES OF DOCUMENTS > and 415 GIGABYTES OF ELECTRONIC RECORDS. [Emphasis in original] To > place this in perspective, we have described the amount of boxes > alone as filling approximately two tractor trailer trucks. *** > [W]here are the funds coming from to house and archive the Biden > Records? We have heard rumors that comments on a draft of the Gift > Agreement may have been located on the Hunter Biden laptop, raising > further questions: why would Hunter Biden be commenting on the > donation of the Biden Records, and what was his role with respect to > the donation? > In our view, the United States House of Representatives would have > the power to subpoena all of these documents. Unlike an effort to > obtain public disclosure of documents under FOIA, a subpoena would > have the power to compel the release of these documents. We believe > that given President Biden’s alleged mishandling of documents, it > is imperative for the House to review the Biden Records to determine > that no classified materials are in the collection, especially given > the fact that we do not even know if the person or persons reviewing > these documents have security clearance. The House should also be > interested in who has funded what is obviously a substantial > donation. With the Gift Agreement out of reach, this remains an > unanswered concern. Finally, the House should have particular > interest in who has had access to the Biden Documents. Even if we > were able to obtain access to the Biden Records, we have no idea if > there have been documents removed during the course of the Delaware > litigation. “The University of Delaware’s conduct throughout this case totally reeks," said DCNF Managing Editor Michael Bastasch. “The American people have a right to know what’s in President Biden’s Senate records and why the university is stonewalling our legitimate records request.” Congress should follow our lead and immediately move to subpoena, secure, and examine the trove of secret Biden Senate records held at the University of Delaware. We will continue fighting in court to overcome the university’s desperate secrecy over its deal with Biden to keep these records away from the American people. U.S. GIVES HAITI ANOTHER $56.5 MILLION AFTER BILLIONS IN AID DISAPPEAR While American taxpayers were watching billions of dollars flow into Ukraine with little accountability, the same has been happening in Haiti with far less attention. This desperate nation is an object lesson in showering money with little result. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog elaborates [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=28807&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXMtZ2l2ZXMtaGFpdGktNTYtbT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]. > Despite well-documented fraud and waste in the U.S. government’s > costly and ineffective Haiti recovery campaign, American taxpayer > dollars keep flowing to the poverty-stricken Caribbean island with > no oversight. This month the Biden administration revealed it is > dedicating an additional $56.5 million > [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=28808&F=T&] > to the failed initiative, explaining that the money is “for the > people of Haiti in response to the country’s humanitarian crisis > and cholera epidemic.” The announcement says Haiti’s alarming > levels of gang violence have prevented people from accessing food, > fuel water and other basic supplies but fails to reveal how this > latest allocation will change that. > > This has been going on for many years and billions in U.S. > assistance—with billions more from the international > community—has made little difference. Since the 2010 earthquake > Uncle Sam alone has provided Haiti with over $5.6 billion > [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=28809&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3RhdGUuZ292L3Utcy1yZWxhdGlvbnMtd2l0aC1oYWl0aS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] to help the nation > bounce back but more than a decade later that has not materialized, > and no one really knows what happened to the money. The funds were > supposed to provide Haiti with “life-saving post-disaster relief > as well as longer-term recovery, reconstruction, and development > programs,” according to the State Department, which confirms that > after the 2021 earthquake the U.S. “again mobilized a > whole-of-government effort to provide immediate assistance at the > Haitian government’s request.” Haiti’s reconstruction and > development will continue for many years, the State Department > predicts, adding that since 2021 it has doled out a whopping $278 > million in humanitarian and health assistance for Haiti. > > The money keeps flowing despite systemic lapses in the programs it > funds. For instance, a costly initiative a to build housing failed > miserably after the U.S. spent $90 million > [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=28810&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvOTAtbWlsLWxhdGVyLXUtcy1mYWlsZWQtYnVpbGQtZW5vdWdoLWhvdXNpbmctaGFpdGkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] > and tens of thousands of Haitians remain homeless a decade later. > The Clinton Foundation and Clinton Bush Haiti Fund also came up with > some $88 million for earthquake recovery but Haiti remains a > disaster, the poorest country in the western hemisphere. > > Even before the tremor, a federal audit > [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=28811&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2FvLmdvdi9hc3NldHMvZ2FvLTEzLTU1OC5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] revealed that hundreds > of millions of American taxpayer dollars were wasted on reckless > Haitian projects with the single largest chunk—$170.3 > million—going to a failed port and power plant adventure heavily > promoted by Bill and Hillary Clinton. The Clinton-backed power and > port venture is the biggest and most expensive failure mentioned in > the probe, which was ordered by a Florida congresswoman who at the > time confirmed a “troubling lack of progress and accountability” > in Haiti reconstruction projects. All these years later many > Haitians still live in deplorable, shanty town tent cities and a > never-ending epidemic of cholera keeps claiming lives. > > American taxpayers have the right to ask where all that money went > and why their government does not have a process in place to assure > resources are properly used to actually help the Haitian people. One > national_ _news report > [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=28812&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmJjbmV3cy5jb20vbmV3cy9pbnZlc3RpZ2F0aW9ucy93aGF0LWRvZXMtaGFpdGktaGF2ZS1zaG93LTEzLWJpbGxpb24tZWFydGhxdWFrZS1haWQtbjI4MTY2MV1fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw== > _pointed out years ago the disconnect between the massive amount of > private and public aid and the poverty, disease and homelessness > that still plague the country. More recently, the nation’s biggest > mainstream newspaper published an article > [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=28813&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20vMjAyMS8wNy8wOC93b3JsZC9oYWl0aS1mb3JlaWduLWFpZC5odG1sXWFza2luZz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM= > why Haiti still despairs after billions in foreign aid. “Since a > powerful earthquake devastated the country in 2010, foreign aid > seems only to have helped perpetuate some of the country’s biggest > troubles,” the story reads, adding that Haiti’s institutions > have become further hollowed after the international > community—including the U.S., of course—pumped $13 billion of > aid into the country. A researcher at a Washington D.C. think tank > is quoted in the story saying that spending billions on so-called > nation-building in Haiti has not worked and has contributed to the > state’s erosion. > > Evidently, this will not stop the government from sending more > money. Even the Trump administration requested $145.5 million > [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62037&L=28814&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZ3AuZmFzLm9yZy9jcnMvcm93L1I0NTAzNC5wZGZdZm9yP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw== aid to Haiti during its > last year in office. Like many of the awards before it, the Biden > administration claims that the most recent $56.5 million allocation > will help “meet urgent humanitarian needs” of people across > Haiti by providing food assistance, medical supplies, access to safe > water and better healthcare. “The United States continues to stand > with the people of Haiti during this challenging time,” the recent > grant announcement says. clean_body: Taxpayer Waster --- in Haiti. [INSIDE JW] Huge Stash of Joe Biden Papers Still Hidden at the University of Delaware [==] In all the news of classified documents at Joe Biden’s homes and elsewhere, one huge pile of documents has been mostly overlooked by everyone – but not us. We’ve been fighting in court with the University of Delaware for more than two years for access to Biden’s Senate papers housed there. Here’s the latest. We filed a reply brief [==] on behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation in the Supreme Court of Delaware in our appeal of a lower court decision blocking access to Joe Biden’s senate papers. We’re asking for limited discovery, including, at a minimum, deposing a university representative. In July 2020 we filed [==] a Delaware Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit after the university denied our April 2020 requests for all of Biden’s Senate records and for records about the preservation and any proposed release of the records, including communications with Biden or his representatives (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. University of Delaware [= (No. N20A-07-001)). Earlier this month we filed an appeal brief [] with the Delaware Supreme Court after the Superior Court sided with the university, finding that the university had met its burden of performing an adequate search for the requested records. That opinion came after the university had submitted a second affidavit from the university’s FOIA official stating that no state funds had been spent on maintaining the documents. In our Supreme Court filing, we argue [ Despite FOIA’s acknowledgment that “public entities, as instruments of government, should not have the power to decide what is good for the public to know,” over the multi-year course of this FOIA proceeding, the University’s efforts to satisfy its statutory burden of proof have been parceled out piecemeal, in minuscule increments, and only in response to court orders, entered after briefing by Appellants. When the shortcomings of the University’s effort are noted in briefing, the University calls “foul.” The University’s umbrage at these proceedings is misplaced. To date, the FOIA Coordinator’s efforts (and her recollections of what steps she took) remain untested by cross examination. Appellants have every right to challenge what they believe has been a lackluster effort by the University to satisfy its statutory burden. Separately, in a January 26, 2023, letter [] to former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Delaware attorney Ted A. Kittila, who serves as our local counsel, details: Based on what we have learned, there are 1,850 BOXES OF DOCUMENTS and 415 GIGABYTES OF ELECTRONIC RECORDS. [Emphasis in original] To place this in perspective, we have described the amount of boxes alone as filling approximately two tractor trailer trucks. [W]here are the funds coming from to house and archive the Biden Records? We have heard rumors that comments on a draft of the Gift Agreement may have been located on the Hunter Biden laptop, raising further questions: why would Hunter Biden be commenting on the donation of the Biden Records, and what was his role with respect to the donation? In our view, the United States House of Representatives would have the power to subpoena all of these documents. Unlike an effort to obtain public disclosure of documents under FOIA, a subpoena would have the power to compel the release of these documents. We believe that given President Biden’s alleged mishandling of documents, it is imperative for the House to review the Biden Records to determine that no classified materials are in the collection, especially given the fact that we do not even know if the person or persons reviewing these documents have security clearance. The House should also be interested in who has funded what is obviously a substantial donation. With the Gift Agreement out of reach, this remains an unanswered concern. Finally, the House should have particular interest in who has had access to the Biden Documents. Even if we were able to obtain access to the Biden Records, we have no idea if there have been documents removed during the course of the Delaware litigation. “The University of Delaware’s conduct throughout this case totally reeks," said DCNF Managing Editor Michael Bastasch. “The American people have a right to know what’s in President Biden’s Senate records and why the university is stonewalling our legitimate records request.” Congress should follow our lead and immediately move to subpoena, secure, and examine the trove of secret Biden Senate records held at the University of Delaware. We will continue fighting in court to overcome the university’s desperate secrecy over its deal with Biden to keep these records away from the American people. U.S. GIVES HAITI ANOTHER $56.5 MILLION AFTER BILLIONS IN AID DISAPPEAR While American taxpayers were watching billions of dollars flow into Ukraine with little accountability, the same has been happening in Haiti with far less attention. This desperate nation is an object lesson in showering money with little result. Our Corruption Chronicles blog elaborates [=]. Despite well-documented fraud and waste in the U.S. government’s costly and ineffective Haiti recovery campaign, American taxpayer dollars keep flowing to the poverty-stricken Caribbean island with no oversight. This month the Biden administration revealed it is dedicating an additional $56.5 million [] to the failed initiative, explaining that the money is “for the people of Haiti in response to the country’s humanitarian crisis and cholera epidemic.” The announcement says Haiti’s alarming levels of gang violence have prevented people from accessing food, fuel water and other basic supplies but fails to reveal how this latest allocation will change that. This has been going on for many years and billions in U.S. assistance—with billions more from the international community—has made little difference. Since the 2010 earthquake Uncle Sam alone has provided Haiti with over $5.6 billion [] to help the nation bounce back but more than a decade later that has not materialized, and no one really knows what happened to the money. The funds were supposed to provide Haiti with “life-saving post-disaster relief as well as longer-term recovery, reconstruction, and development programs,” according to the State Department, which confirms that after the 2021 earthquake the U.S. “again mobilized a whole-of-government effort to provide immediate assistance at the Haitian government’s request.” Haiti’s reconstruction and development will continue for many years, the State Department predicts, adding that since 2021 it has doled out a whopping $278 million in humanitarian and health assistance for Haiti. The money keeps flowing despite systemic lapses in the programs it funds. For instance, a costly initiative a to build housing failed miserably after the U.S. spent $90 million [==] and tens of thousands of Haitians remain homeless a decade later. The Clinton Foundation and Clinton Bush Haiti Fund also came up with some $88 million for earthquake recovery but Haiti remains a disaster, the poorest country in the western hemisphere. Even before the tremor, a federal audit [] revealed that hundreds of millions of American taxpayer dollars were wasted on reckless Haitian projects with the single largest chunk—$170.3 million—going to a failed port and power plant adventure heavily promoted by Bill and Hillary Clinton. The Clinton-backed power and port venture is the biggest and most expensive failure mentioned in the probe, which was ordered by a Florida congresswoman who at the time confirmed a “troubling lack of progress and accountability” in Haiti reconstruction projects. All these years later many Haitians still live in deplorable, shanty town tent cities and a never-ending epidemic of cholera keeps claiming lives. American taxpayers have the right to ask where all that money went and why their government does not have a process in place to assure resources are properly used to actually help the Haitian people. One national news report [== pointed out years ago the disconnect between the massive amount of private and public aid and the poverty, disease and homelessness that still plague the country. More recently, the nation’s biggest mainstream newspaper published an article [= why Haiti still despairs after billions in foreign aid. “Since a powerful earthquake devastated the country in 2010, foreign aid seems only to have helped perpetuate some of the country’s biggest troubles,” the story reads, adding that Haiti’s institutions have become further hollowed after the international community—including the U.S., of course—pumped $13 billion of aid into the country. A researcher at a Washington D.C. think tank is quoted in the story saying that spending billions on so-called nation-building in Haiti has not worked and has contributed to the state’s erosion. Evidently, this will not stop the government from sending more money. Even the Trump administration requested $145.5 million [== aid to Haiti during its last year in office. Like many of the awards before it, the Biden administration claims that the most recent $56.5 million allocation will help “meet urgent humanitarian needs” of people across Haiti by providing food assistance, medical supplies, access to safe water and better healthcare. “The United States continues to stand with the people of Haiti during this challenging time,” the recent grant announcement says. | | Abortion in Hawaiʻi: What Can We Do?
---
| | Posted by Rocklin Youngstrom, 3 min
---
| | [](https://www.hawaiiconservatives.org/so/6aOOQFcpN/c?w=ySgm1_YjYt9DDGwOU3S71AVbw0SyxIyVaJ4EYz8rLvo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGF3YWlpY29uc2VydmF0aXZlcy5vcmcvcG9zdC9hYm9ydGlvbi1pbi1oYXdhaSVDQSVCQmktd2hhdC1jYW4td2UtZG8iLCJyIjoiZjM2NmNlYmYtMzU5OS00YWVmLTljNjQtMTI3MzhmZjg5MzlmIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiYmUyZTY2MmEtYzdjMy00NmViLWE3M2UtYTNjNDRmNWYxNDIyIn0)
---
| | Just this week, on Wednesday, February 1st, 2023, the State Senate held a joint committee hearing to expand abortion access by reducing requirements to perform abortions in [SB1](https://www.hawaiiconservatives.org/so/6aOOQFcpN/c?w=qgcfmPkaAPEiODA342PhhQqwKxzjMSL9LyudGCN4UuI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2FwaXRvbC5oYXdhaWkuZ292L3Nlc3Npb25zL3Nlc3Npb24yMDIzL2JpbGxzL1NCMV8ucGRmIiwiciI6IjI4OWZhYmFiLTM2YmUtNGI4Zi1hODlhLTU2Yjc2MTkyNWMyYiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImJlMmU2NjJhLWM3YzMtNDZlYi1hNzNlLWEzYzQ0ZjVmMTQyMiJ9) and to create an abortion haven in [SB896](https://www.hawaiiconservatives.org/so/6aOOQFcpN/c?w=arE-V4RTfU04Rra2oBM_5hTVhueL19aogTL9ZIixynw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2FwaXRvbC5oYXdhaWkuZ292L3Nlc3Npb25zL3Nlc3Npb24yMDIzL2JpbGxzL1NCODk2Xy5wZGYiLCJyIjoiMjg5ZmFiYWItMzZiZS00YjhmLWE4OWEtNTZiNzYxOTI1YzJiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiYmUyZTY2MmEtYzdjMy00NmViLWE3M2UtYTNjNDRmNWYxNDIyIn0). Unfortunately, both of these bills were recommended by the committee to pass with only one vote against them made by Republican Senator Brenton Awa.

name: House Conservatives
subject: BREAKING FROM FOX: Biden's ESG investment rules threaten your retirement savings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
IT'S HAPPENING!
|
---
| | | **IT 'S HAPPENING:**
_Fox News: Biden's ESG investment rules threaten your retirement savings_
This is an emergency for people saving for retirement. Joe Biden's devastating new rule allowing retirement planners to consider woke factors when making investment decisions for retirees JUST WENT INTO EFFECT... and we're running out of time to strike it down!

**The retirement savings of millions of Americans could be hanging in the balance and so we need your help straight away.**

_**[Will you stand with House Republicans as they race ahead to STRIKE DOWN BIDEN'S NEW RULE and protect retirees?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286032:67AqohGNR:m:1:3331421248:894D207F6BABA91733EC72B3468D97C3:r "Will you stand with House Republicans
as they race ahead to STRIKE DOWN BIDEN’S NEW RULE and protect retirees?")**_

We refuse to sit by while Joe Biden prioritizes his woke agenda over the financial interest of retirees, so we're rallying EVERYONE saving for retirement - or depending on their 401k to get by - to stop him.

Are you with us? Stand with House Republicans right now!

_\------------ Forwarded Message ------------_

---
** \--**** OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM REPUBLICAN HQ --**
_If you know any other retirees: please read, then forward this email to them immediately._
If you are a retiree or saving for retirement, listen up!

We don't normally write emails this long, but this is an extraordinary circumstance, and you deserve a full explanation: Joe Biden is rolling out a new rule allowing retirement planners to consider woke, social justice factors when making financial decisions.

**It 's called ESG - or Environment and Social Governance considerations - and under Biden's new rule, activist financial planners can put their woke agenda ahead of your financial success. **

_**[Biden's new rule is being implemented as you read this email, and we need to move NOW to stop it. If we fail to respond right away, it'll be too late.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286032:67AqohGNR:m:1:3331421248:894D207F6BABA91733EC72B3468D97C3:r "Biden’s new rule is being
implemented as you read this email, and we need to move NOW to stop it. If we fail to respond right away, it’ll be too late.")**_

Imagine if this happened to you...

_Let 's say you spent the last several decades building a retirement account for yourself and your spouse, and you entrusted a financial planner to manage it. You check it every few years, but you notice a steep decline in performance starting in 2023. You're stunned because you're depending on this nest egg to retire in peace, and it's taken a big hit. So, you reach out to your financial planner who informs you they:_
\-- Stopped investing in oil and gas because it's bad for the environment
\-- Divested in coal and moved your money into solar and wind technology
\-- Halted investments in Company A since its board doesn't reach a certain race quota
\-- Moved from Company B (your best investment) to Company C because its carbon footprint was lower
\-- Invested more in Company D since it donated to a woke organization
**It 's no exaggeration to say this rule could affect every retirement saving account in America and all Conservatives should take immediate notice.**
_**[We're calling on every retiree in America - and anyone else saving for retirement - to help us STRIKE THIS RULE DOWN IMMEDIATELY. Joe Biden thinks we'll stand by and accept this new rule forced upon us... Is Biden right, or do you have the determination to stand to him before it goes live NATIONWIDE? We hope we can count on you to make an important contribution before the end of the day.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286032:67AqohGNR:m:1:3331421248:894D207F6BABA91733EC72B3468D97C3:r "We’re calling on every retiree
in America – and anyone else saving for retirement – to help us STRIKE THIS RULE DOWN IMMEDIATELY. Joe Biden thinks we’ll stand by
and accept this new rule forced upon us... Is Biden right, or do you have the determination to stand to him before it goes live NATIONWIDE? We hope we
can count on you to make an important contribution before the end of the day.")**_

Biden and his Liberal buddies want to fundamentally change the way retirement planners invest our money. They'll promote their woke agenda even if it means sacrificing your financial security. This is an urgent problem, and it warrants an urgent solution.

That's why your support is essential. Are you in? We sincerely hope so!

For America,
Republican HQ

**\-- OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM REPUBLICAN HQ --**
_If you know any other retirees: please read, then forward this email to them immediately._

---
|
---
| Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

body:
This is one of my biggest fights yet. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1595%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=kW4Y%2fKfYP%2fsy1J7gTapQRQ&sysid=1)

---
Fellow Patriot, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---

I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just five dollars!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658825%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cviUlzmcD2DH%2b6gvyS1n5w&sysid=1)

---
I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. **Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset.** [**Because this fight is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book,_The American Response to the Great Reset,_ for a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658827%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mRJM9MSnGpPCch4loTh49A&sysid=1)
---

---
Whether you've heard of the WEF's Great Reset agenda before, or you're just learning of it now ... you must read this book. If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. [**And I want to send you a copy of _The American Response to the Great Reset_ RIGHT AWAY. Please claim your book right now with a gift to Turning Point USA of ANY AMOUNT, even just five dollars.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658828%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7FYxuUX91D19Na40FY%2fKcQ&sysid=1) Thank you for helping Turning Point USA expose and DEFEAT the Great Reset agenda. For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp6tl91e09s2ekg0orcgoalddca857r0qnpqrn90_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg61ob4chh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkisgmgp7j8du7nkam0r5eggn3sfo4olh19b6ol0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg61ob4chh2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5qt2amj08mcp9tdrp34amievqgj6si67v8oek08_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg61ob4chh2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._

name: American Federation for Children
subject: Families deserve the power to choose, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by American Federation for Children |
body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice!
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbug2j5dcs0nsptb9dt8798k21ufgbi7kq8mhep8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg61ob4c9h2bs)
---
| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling.**That’s why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of everyday Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide.This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we’re RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, friend?_**Here is the pledge...**
---
| | _“I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school.”_
---
| | [**SIGN THE PLEDGE TODAY >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcs4top3vin48ied90bbbkfk3m0tkhbnvg5maok8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg61ob4c9h2bs)
---
| | **friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE – _and kids deserve better_ – [_join our movement and sign the Education Freedom Pledge today! >>_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdperbgm6a9vtb1qs207vkl26ieof4hedcqrlvro_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg61ob4c9h2bs)**
---

---
| | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America.**Some of the Education Freedom Pledge’s top signers include...**
---
| |
* Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds
* AFC Senior Fellow Corey DeAngelis
* Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos
* Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr.
* **[_Add YOUR NAME here >>_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh38p11cori4fn1buaeqtmkho01qr7s27p1sb75g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg61ob4c9h2bs)**

---
| | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn’t best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement – the teachers’ unions – wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, **and we need your voice.** **If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.[_We hope you’ll take a stand today! >>_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3n7om82go3nq5n2gg9is4fcp3cfe8b9kkcmhmi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg61ob4c9h2bs)**
---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6qcvr0lg0lrl4ikkg8e6lu6oh6v4joss23nm2co_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg61ob4c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6etktii7dssasik5cd93kpjg8d3d2n6j2dd3mjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg61ob4c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zflq1o3j8gaq5bhhmap06k9rl18pn9mtavoctsjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg61ob4c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf77rk3f1f3lj7immd8t9qsltd800qdmdlj2lqt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg61ob4c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

clean_body: The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice! | | | | | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling.That’s why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021... to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country. The result? Thousands of everyday Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide.This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, we’re RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE! Will you take a stand for school choice today, friend?Here is the pledge... | | “I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school.” | | | | friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE – and kids deserve better – | | | | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America.Some of the Education Freedom Pledge’s top signers include... | | Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds AFC Senior Fellow Corey DeAngelis Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr. | | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn’t best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement – the teachers’ unions – wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, and we need your voice. If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.** | | | | Thank you,Digital TeamAmerican Federation of Children | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by American Federation for Children | | American Federation for Children 5950 Berkshire Lane, Suite 325 Dallas, TX 75225 | | | | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3nmlckii9mcu3su68831bo3ruo3ghbuntikvg68_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg69pj0c3h2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1u0d7q271pq981beca38lvn42min48a786mjepg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg69pj0c3h2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zniacalet8lf91c7mh1iglgeohku6oqni4mnmlog_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg69pj0c3h2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqclv6sbr5tsj254cjs3he5tcf3v33ef8vmhlo9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg69pj0c3h2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zms7kqk208otsn8rfn6v678clgd88rv5010kc5c8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg69pj0c3h2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoasiblfic459ob7gkibecp5dfcnhe2hqvm2pkag_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clg69pj0c3h2bs)

subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt462lh6s2k913mqnf2dtp03pabj1s0gk0vufuu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli60oj4c1h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfrcuc3li1eabs4elc9muof5mbfh7r4u5n331p0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli60oj4c1h2bs)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9j5soke1o28bv8lu5sb02eg0jdpoo30ubggjcco_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli60oj4c1h2bs)
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf7obtvanrm6m4orsusst4kcdkb43g4ci0jpsn8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli60oj4c1h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z06kj7mu42m1fu41lc6lqbfs2kl6u0sn6h1qcuv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli60oj4c1h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---

---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcbg7eknmcf039ft34rn8q1ad0l56cm3c34b6uv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli60oj4c1h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Your 2023 Second Amendment Survey
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution-with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-46Q "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty-which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty-including the Second Amendment-for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry-supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution-including the Second Amendment-is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDM1LTgxOWM1NGMyY2EzNTQ0Mzg5NzkyYTI2ZTY0ZWZmZjAyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/Mm7v-XQzfNNFgTWeBsWU_A) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: This is exciting news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Would you like a SIGNED copy of my new book?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

I'm excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don't want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea's Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

**[I'm granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book's release to the general public. Will you claim your book before they run out?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcbdb33i532e6lpf8n5kreprm4u2irb2p86nt3qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli60oj4chh2bs "I’m granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book’s release to the general public. Will you claim your book before they run out?")**

name: House Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: Peter, Ilhan Omar had to go.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | |
---
| | | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286056:JCurVhGcN:m:1:3334294963:D74499D85C8D85613BA588091E8448E9:r "Generic
Button")
---
Hi Peter,

When Nancy Pelosi took the unprecedented step of removing Republican members from their committee assignments, I vowed not to forget when House Republicans took back power.

So when Democrats appointed antisemite Ilhan Omar to the Foreign Affairs Committee, House Republicans had no choice but to remove her.

**_If you support this decision, will you have the courage to stand with me right now?_**
---
| | | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286056:JCurVhGcN:m:1:3334294963:D74499D85C8D85613BA588091E8448E9:r "Generic Button")
---
But make no mistake, this move does not come without risks.

**_[The mainstream media is already coming to her defense and viciously attacking me for opposing her antisemitism. That's why I'm asking you to chip in right now and stand with me against these attacks from the Radical Left.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286056:JCurVhGcN:m:1:3334294963:D74499D85C8D85613BA588091E8448E9:r "The mainstream media is already coming to her defense and viciously attacking me for opposing
her antisemitism. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now and stand with me against these attacks from the Radical Left.")_**

_The Democrats and their media allies are already attacking me and making excuses for her anti-semitic remarks,_ **but I will never apologize for standing up to hate. **

I'm not backing down from this fight; I know you won't either.

**_[So please, chip in now and support me as I fight back against these outrageous attacks and work to protect America.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286056:JCurVhGcN:m:1:3334294963:D74499D85C8D85613BA588091E8448E9:r "So please, chip in now and support me as I fight back against these outrageous attacks and
work to protect America. ")_**
---
| | | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286056:JCurVhGcN:m:1:3334294963:D74499D85C8D85613BA588091E8448E9:r "Generic Button")
---
For America,

Kevin McCarthy
