name: American Update
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1597%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=HHqyX2hXwN%2fX3%2fQuO0EUHg&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658820%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rqVSXXOUZg0cm6pt6PI%2bxQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658821%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6NuMrArO4Q26P5d2Lgh7YA&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658822%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FwkivxsRARAIRGnx8PP67g&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658823%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QheGkfZ0O8CXvXbEvq6H1A&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1597%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=HHqyX2hXwN%2fX3%2fQuO0EUHg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1597%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=HHqyX2hXwN%2fX3%2fQuO0EUHg&sysid=1)

subject: This is exciting news

body:

|

| | |
Friend,

I'm excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don't want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea's Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

**[I'm granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book's release to the general public. Will you claim your book before they run out?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsac447ib6erlttcb5mvai40gucki029ldur24po_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli64o34cdh2bs "I’m granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book’s release to the general public. I understand you're one of the top Republican patriots in the country, so I want to make sure you get a signed copy! But there are only a limited number available and supplies are quickly running out.

**[My new book _Never Give An Inch_ will be yours with a $45 donation to help Republicans take back America.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z65aa5u4bjs5fc6aieqrhhvnuo55n0v8ilr72o18_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli64o34cdh2bs "My new book Never Give An Inch will be yours with a $45 donation to help Republicans take back America.")**

Mike Pompeo

name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp6c5re7fl57v3dqonrafvkh90orpg7s72kkm07o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6co76cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsribo09r1ulg34e3k7c22pssajboh149n1e9aqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6co76cjh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zladqiagn4o3ub9gvsosfk19oaeb99apfiedg8dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6co76cjh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv26l9la7dvq6g2n6aq0qur2io085be244cfn4eg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6co76cjh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Week in Review - February 4, 2023
body:
|
---
| | |
---
|
## Why can't we be more like Florida?
---
| By Steve HopkinsOn Thursday there was a bill to fix the pay raises for teachers’ assistants. The chairman jumps up and proposes an amendment to tack on a $3,000 pay raise. Of course, being an election year, they allowed the amendment and let it pass, knowing full well that they would strip the raise out in conference.I have said that I will vote NO on all pay raises until the state income tax has been eliminated, which means a pay raise for all working Mississippians, not just those who work for the government. Not just salaries, I'm voting no on anything that grows government and any budget that is larger than the previous year. We have the money to do all the right things, we just do not have enough of the right people in Jackson that want to do it for the people that need it most.This is an excruciatingly hard stance for me when it comes to education because, year after year, I submitted bills for raises for teachers and teachers’ assistants. I have many teachers in my family, including my wife, but how unfair is it of me to vote for a raise for my household when the rest of the state is suffering through the worst recession of my lifetime.They know that these raises, increased spending and growing government mean new commitments to the taxpayers, and it makes it harder to eliminate the income tax, but they don’t care. They only want to get re-elected, so they spend like there’s no tomorrow and put the taxpayers on the hook for billions.I am fighting for a self-sufficient, federal government-free state like Florida! So the next time you hear someone say "why can't we be more like Florida?" refer them to this post.
---
| | To learn more about Steve Hopkins, visit [Steve's Facebook Page](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/zlrMyWfukJz3YA6yIGY0vg)| **Mississippi Freedom Caucus member and past chairman Steve Hopkins has announced his campaign for Mississippi Senate District 1.**
---
To learn more about Chris Brown, go to [www.ChrisBrown4MS.com](https://www.chrisbrown4ms.com)| **Freedom Caucus member Chris Brown has announced his campaign for Public Service Commissioner.**
---
| | Rep. Chris Brown discusses why he is running for Public Service Commissioner
---
| | [Click Here for the Freedom Corner Podcast ](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/CKNfxxoHb02Vm9FXZnz3bw)
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/Xu2EMQ7X5KlekNus1XR5Vw) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

So the next time you hear someone say "why can't we be more like Florida?" refer them to this post. | | To learn more about Steve Hopkins, visit | Mississippi Freedom Caucus member and past chairman Steve Hopkins has announced his campaign for Mississippi Senate District 1. To learn more about Chris Brown, go to | Freedom Caucus member Chris Brown has announced his campaign for Public Service Commissioner. | | Rep. Chris Brown discusses why he is running for Public Service Commissioner | | | You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus. Click to unsubscribe from this mailing list. | |

name: Congresswoman Lauren Boebert
subject: I didn’t win my election to fight for the swamp.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286069:6oHJVhG0N:m:1:3331421248:3D66224A3203E2245D860425CBBAE5B2:r)
---
| | | Peter,

When my district elected me to Congress, it was because **I made a promise to them that I was going to drain the swamp.**

I'm **never going to waver** on that promise. That's why I've voted for Jim Jordan for Speaker of the House and it's why I will be supportive of a Speaker who will unify our party behind the core principles I was elected to stand up for.

Unfortunately, many of my colleagues would prefer to go along to get along, but I was elected to secure the border, get spending under control, and fix our energy crisis.

This fight is about **making sure we have a Republican leader that will aggressively push that agenda forward.**

If you believe in freedom... if you believe in our true conservative values... if you believe in truly draining the SWAMP, then [please help us do it.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286069:6oHJVhG0N:m:1:3331421248:3D66224A3203E2245D860425CBBAE5B2:r)

name: American Defense News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfmc4sp579fsro722odfm559579j4nkfp54k0hjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjdmnb5he1pd4og214aee9g3ek3iu1ticfl3gag8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor6c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaeeah0grj22vtpqph7jm940h9bj94nhh9fhn9q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor6c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu71l2lgle92fru4skbcu2t7suigdspvha36qbt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor6c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: America's Biggest Threat In 2023
body:
BREAKING – A brutal attack on North Carolina's power grid has left 45,000 residents in the dark and scrambling for a way to st
# America's Biggest Threat In 2023
**BREAKING** - A brutal attack on North Carolina's power grid has left 45,000 residents in the dark and scrambling for a way to stay safe. In 2022 alone there have been over 70 attacks on the power grid with reports of six in Florida, five in Oregon and Washington. And according to national security experts, this trend is only going to continue. As America's power grid comes under increasing attack, will your city be the next to fall victim to this growing threat? It's a harsh reality, but one that we must face head on. **National security experts warn there is an imminent threat to the national electric grid.** In fact, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total darkness. Without access to a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer would spoil. Your well couldn't pump any fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. You wouldn't be able to operate your radio or TV or charge your cell phone, so you'd feel isolated and cut off from your friends and family. This is not some crazy doomsday theory, but a very real and imminent threat. Retired CENTCOM General Lloyd Austin has warned that it's not a question of if, but when. [**When massive blackouts strike the U.S.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4amgjqkgn59pf50usn47somvshihnqpo6o69hn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor1cph2bs) Dr. Peter Pry, former CIA official and Chief of Staff of the Congressional EMP Commission, and other top national security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States: **Our crumbling electric grid.** When our electric grid fails, it will be like watching America have a heart attack right before your eyes, because when the heart stops pumping, everything shuts down and the patient flat lines. Our enemies could cripple our great country in a matter of minutes. Former CIA Director James Woolsey warns that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year killing 9 of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Our enemies could just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's infrastructure. They've ignored dire warnings from national security experts about the grid's vulnerability to physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyber-attacks. **"Our death toll would be staggering"** reports FOXNews. We are all fine when the power goes out for a few hours or even days. But an extended blackout would be devastating. Will you be prepared for a crisis that could take months or even years to recover from? How will you stay safe, warm and protected? [**What will you do when the power goes out?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbo7l56frrltr6uvl354hj7f69jg8rjpr3dpovk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor1cph2bs) **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without** gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs51cm9br260dvploiogqukdahusnojljseonp10_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor1cph2bs) **It's a breakthrough NEW device that generates continuous watts of clean, quiet and FREE renewable power.** That's enough to power lights for safety and comfort, your computer, TV or cell phone. Even small appliances like a small freezer or critical medical device that will sustain your family during a power outage. [**You can see a live demo of it in action here**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zeac5e47uc6jicubkaf512hn12fs0jokoqhi1q6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor1cph2bs) Imagine how much peace of mind you'll have right away when you get your own. Because if a crisis hits and your family asks, "When will the power come back on?" you'll calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty of electricity to power the critical items. You'll be able to power lights, preserve food, recharge cell phones and computers or keep critical medical devices going. Your home will be a little island of light and warmth in a storm - be it natural or man-made. Listen, nobody can predict the future. None of us know exactly when or how the next attack will hit our electrical grid. But from everything we see, it could be devastating. Watch this video and find out for yourself... **[Click here to see it in action!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zff2q7uh11t1n1j829akckaodnt4pn7663mr00oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor1cph2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhc2o4lbh3lbtfnm586a1keol6565qtqk10gfn60_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7clim8pb3c5j649fg)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: They’re lying to us
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlu77jntl1avkcajc3smncboedl916k0r5n79t30_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor6cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z60aump27nnd4gb5s3jf2dthb8pc833s49s84320_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor6cth2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8cu4og96sigkhjimolvstdb8d6q5m9jf1bnv560_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor6cth2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo0us19ae3rd16c1gp02m78br3mvoah1q4bju900_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor6cth2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zderve3g85j08d8h10ltogtv3j9ej5gorl141gbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor6cth2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6kqs0va27mokg5jbk544tbrg7i8lsb291nab3m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor6cth2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ks6bv1vckvihoddi707ebc4tkq83jbmdupj8o8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli6aor6cth2bs)
---

This included putting her on experimental drugs likeLupron , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders... ... Giving her constant testosterone injections... ... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15. How was this allowed to happen? name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztqdi1ibhgj0gc6oe86nei0k1rvat1ra3fq1ifv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0sfk7rqdjpnju8k6ukm01ggchm2n5qesv0s374o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z07l73psdmaamndrfb8ll361qu9vphs40cjrmdng_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4lj319jqal49em1q0c3chjqrsvff3cmra5n3k2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ura3tueqjf3bcladtern0novr45dmtse2i1gjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze8vjs2igrdl2o1c0h06v6m0qtlk6ujl5tne304o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjpfr1qsmj4gle7a9lg4ash82k41jh69dmc1p420_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsludoclg0tghqmb86ou4ebf946vb4s97tqnkf7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhdh62o4j5a6t12lrl8jjqk0oq71ikfdlukksuno_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zch3qc4nkcq38b5qa1b0nahjuiubs3bcgne2bruo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6hp9hg62lagvtm1m2p1peuqlneoc6no579udmd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5p3quqc32a6c1gfcltd3mqimofe7vvj4fv5v4b0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z37qmo51d6sdc3pam4dka3kjc1idgsjgeo2j6l30_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhol3h9arc62f76poo33skeqko9u4v9r21rvovc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zov0opfhhjda4fp96csijbv7ee68av4ca0do1b2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1gf65opmigfv21k1lq2oqdfpmg2hppagkb1bqdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgiplj0tosaej3itql5s2dgvirdamp7l3p4nkej0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpge9gfrig9h8lnuo6pqfqdp2tl1i6gtral4ddgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zlfbsp03c761ohj7k39r4jtg6v8biaa1gcj18me8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj6dnp7hpl98kh2qcth1ld3iaih8m7mjgnfm7cqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli66pb6c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Democrats can have another House seat in less than 3 weeks if we can pull together and make sure Jennifer McClellan wins this race in Virginia … one that the GOP will throw everything they can into.
body:
Feb. 21 special election in Virginia
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d2692e3-4b0a-439e-af0d-78dcb3974303/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_LESS THAN THREE WEEKS:_ [We can shrink the GOP House Majority THIS MONTH and make Kevin McCarthy miserable by electing Jennifer McClellan in Virginia!!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90cd38fe-496c-448c-8a20-ae469f2ab054/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68af0f49-388c-47e3-a940-bd6abd72693f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _It's been painful watching the clown show in Congress, led by Weaker (as I like to call him) McCarthy. He's brought chaos, stupidity and incompetence to the House, and endangered us by putting Marjorie Taylor Greene on the Homeland Security Committee._ _Yet, his weakness is opportunity._ _House Republicans have one of the smallest majorities ever and we can shrink it further. There's an open seat in Virginia, sadly, vacated when Rep. Donald McEachin passed away in November. **Progressive Democrat Jennifer McClellan is running for it, and the election's only weeks away!**_** ** [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in making history and adding another Democrat to the House? Can you please give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can elect Democrat Jennifer McClellan to Congress?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8eb8d0b5-c01b-4133-84a1-9fbe1ab589f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Yes, it's a Democratic seat. Yet, so was George Santos' seat. We MUST NEVER take anything for granted. **
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T752f5ca9-8291-4cab-9cfd-af9550b89a34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_McClellan would be the first Black woman elected to the House from this district. __She has a long history of civil rights activism and was elected to the state assembly, then state senate, where now she serves. This Includes her role as Vice-Chair of the Virginia Legislative Black Caucus._** _McClellan's opponent is a MAGA nut who attacked our democracy and endangered election workers by claiming the 2020 election was stolen. He would ban abortion and eliminate all gun laws._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in making history and adding another Democrat to the House? Can you please give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can elect Democrat Jennifer McClellan to Congress?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3b572fd-e710-4c64-883f-70963276d4c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping Democrats thrive, passing progressive policy and increasing Kevin McCarthy's suffering as he manages an even smaller caucus._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---

---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/jennifermcclellan-vahouserace7-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5076cff-baba-49a6-af4a-6b7e2d267045/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Your America
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7993%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=t9OlesT6pGsSDnqHTvMjTA&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94201%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8EvC1NAyUPNvGxA0UMX9iA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94202%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1Heeh%2b3Zdd%2fCFJNsdAHwWA&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94203%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8jdhkU5C1x%2fn0UtL%2fBXnHQ&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94204%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CdS95a0c4MquxU3rzRcGAg&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7993%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=t9OlesT6pGsSDnqHTvMjTA&sysid=1)_

name: Team Becca
subject: WATCH: Becca on Morning Joe!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:

subject: This is exciting news

body:
Would you like a SIGNED copy of my new book?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

I'm excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don't want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea's Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

**[I'm granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book's release to the general public. name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7663%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=aXOyoNWKJ3G1lQlGWSjggQ&sysid=1)
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78857%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iKTSSHTEh%2fQHKn2OIOr%2fzw&sysid=1)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78858%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9OC%2bVUwkXwtt1qjcgHcBnQ&sysid=1)**

subject: Exposing the Great Reset
body:
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94216%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lfm7LsE2w6efGal0KwaeEg&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94216%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lfm7LsE2w6efGal0KwaeEg&sysid=1)
---
I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6nb23amlvbslus73fhoa4elkg64ubqu4e2o55hg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli69oj2clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z36b6ft4u3gt0co5s7vsj96at2rreogf1dp3r5a0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli69oj2clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn0qmlamtvtlgj3hr249a2lpdeldcq3g0dti5io0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cli69oj2clh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Celebrating Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
I salute Black Americans, young and old, everyday unsung s/heroes and acknowledged leaders as we celebrate Black History Month. The hard work and sacrifice of our Black Sisters and Brothers has resulted in fundamental civil rights for all of us, especially non-Black communities of color.
I am personally grateful to the Black community of **Philadelphia** who have welcomed me and helped me put my roots down and call this City my home. As a survivor of a brutal War of Liberation that created the new country of Bangladesh, as a non-Black person of color, I identify with fighting oppression and stand in solidarity with the Black community.
As a woman, brown Muslim immigrant, a feminist I won Philadelphia twice in 2020 during the race for Pennsylvania Auditor General, the 6-way contested Primary and then again in the General (even though rest of PA did not deliver a statewide win). Winning these races during a pandemic is truly a testament to the voters who believed in me; a city with a population of over 65% People of Color, with 42% being Black Philadelphians.
I am committed to fight the attempts to erase Black History, which is American History, from our classrooms. I will fight to end structural racism that has infected all levels of our government and society. Let us roll up our collective sleeves and create a city where **#BlackLivesMatter** and we **#LeaveNoOneBehind**!!

clean_body: I salute Black Americans, young and old, everyday unsung s/heroes and acknowledged leaders as we celebrate Black History Month. The hard work and sacrifice of our Black Sisters and Brothers has resulted in fundamental civil rights for all of us, especially non-Black communities of color. I am personally grateful to the Black community of Philadelphia who have welcomed me and helped me put my roots down and call this City my home. As a survivor of a brutal War of Liberation that created the new country of Bangladesh, as a non-Black person of color, I identify with fighting oppression and stand in solidarity with the Black community. As a woman, brown Muslim immigrant, a feminist I won Philadelphia twice in 2020 during the race for Pennsylvania Auditor General, the 6-way contested Primary and then again in the General (even though rest of PA did not deliver a statewide win). Winning these races during a pandemic is truly a testament to the voters who believed in me; a city with a population of over 65% People of Color, with 42% being Black Philadelphians. I am committed to fight the attempts to erase Black History, which is American History, from our classrooms. I will fight to end structural racism that has infected all levels of our government and society. Let us roll up our collective sleeves and create a city where #BlackLivesMatter and we #LeaveNoOneBehind!! = For more information about Nina's campaign, Please visit: = Paid for by Nina for Philly Nina for Philly PO Box 27339 Philadelphia PA 19118 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

body:
I don't need their permission to carry my firearm.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286725:660XGhGNB:m:1:3331421248:2BA7843E59368AD96888A00BEC9D2173:r)
---
Peter,
---
Democrats on the Natural Resources Committee just tried to strip away my Second Amendment right to carry a firearm for my own personal protection.
---
**The same Democrats who are voting to send guns to Ukraine are telling me that I can 't carry one to defend myself. **
---
But it's not just me they want to disarm. They're coming after EVERY American who wants to freely exercise their Second Amendment right to carry a firearm for self-defense.
---
[**Please make a contribution to help me HOLD THE LINE against radical gun-grabbing Democrats who want to DISARM Americans like us.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286725:660XGhGNB:m:1:3331421248:2BA7843E59368AD96888A00BEC9D2173:r)

This week, I triggered liberals by wearing an AR-15 pin in Congress.
---
I was shedding light on the horrific instances of human trafficking that are occurring at our southern border - _but it was the AR-15 pin that outraged and offended them!_
---
Now, the Democrats and the liberal media are calling me an "extremist".
---
**_They had the audacity to question why I might want to carry a firearm to protect myself ... _**
---
During the 2022 campaign, I was threatened by a man who said he was going to shoot me at close range.
---
Leftists broke our car windows, shoved razor blades in our tires, and graffitied our campaign signs.
---
Threats against members of Congress - especially women - remain disturbingly high.
---
**_I reserve the right to carry my firearm in whatever capacity I want to without "permission" from gun-grabbing Democrats. _**
---
I REFUSE to let them disarm me - and I certainly won't let them disarm YOU.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help me HOLD THE LINE against radical gun-grabbing Democrats who want to DISARM Americans like us.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62286725:660XGhGNB:m:1:3331421248:2BA7843E59368AD96888A00BEC9D2173:r)

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztmdgki6cqsadj8it4q9tmcbi991ajbf6dc7kus8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clh6cpr4chh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqadn8al0hl125ijlbrmfk51gsquvqch05pffpqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clh6cpr4chh2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhra8ua4qodhdf9b7hi7un6siqnts3gff070qpug_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clh6cpr4chh2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z368agvqatlrdirjn74em07lqe3d0mp9cv3vem7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clh6cpr4chh2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z404j1fmbdugc0qapg834dbvo4e36r8od3r8mo4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clh6cpr4chh2bs)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: VADEMS
subject: Glenn Youngkin is wrong (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
72% of Virginians agree

|
---
Derek, This week Glenn Youngkin made an appearance at the anti-abortion rally and told the crowd he was **“incredibly disappointed”** that Senate Democrats successfully protected Virginians’ right to an abortion. Friend,

It's official. I'm making a special announcement in 13 days.

The survival of America matters. That's why I've never stopped standing for America, and I never will. America is the greatest force for good in human history, and we should never be ashamed to say that.

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fcfaa96526640ebbad5f2afb52453fc&_e=TRXQLS7da2d5kROaj9_Xd7OXHt3jQPnd5Co12XaDrAZaSh3vSvNuPuatITRWjgNLLz4GZY5PAbt7u-4ZKmtQ1lfBFUiPas2nTI6IfzKoqf3fo6YZoEX4I4cozoG8J74F3Eqea-4VC-8huNVWbnyEGRzkEWQfyhjrNdIElV-ZcaMUpHuIHQc4Bye8aMOMhwIewEebaoJhPdLbQ-SdQBaS8T0nQObIczvX36scdLKD8xiDZnLLs_DC5xyr-QA7pUGpbsEu7AvEGECej6vDqtBmvhuVAxgzg2t-JLTM7TgMhOrSvxyejrBfPT4cVn63pLvd0JeV0fGQ-HT1dEYR0aqdAj4pDWbB56pgazdRr_v4IcUxVxNByIGZVqqW_bZGyIO7fBxX5_UE0Lw51Ppx_TTn0w%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fcfaa96526640ebbad5f2afb52453fc&_e=TRXQLS7da2d5kROaj9_Xd7OXHt3jQPnd5Co12XaDrAZaSh3vSvNuPuatITRWjgNLLz4GZY5PAbt7u-4ZKmtQ1lfBFUiPas2nTI6IfzKoqf3fo6YZoEX4I4cozoG8J74F3Eqea-4VC-8huNVWbnyEGRzkEWQfyhjrNdIElV-ZcaMUpHuIHQc4Bye8aMOMhwIewEebaoJhPdLbQ-SdQBaS8T0nQObIczvX36scdLKD8xiDZnLLs_DC5xyr-QA7pUGpXVE_9YrcISYYtRdy2JjIv6rMG0htE_PFKhtBR1rQKs6N2J2m1SwurN39iM8YebsdScvk2Irbn3EMnyoyqR0ZRv4ZFmXcWWEW-P_17ZKFhRDAQjrnFHti9zGKYv0YTFKFrydjX02l0VLr6bfg5fK7yg%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0fcfaa96526640ebbad5f2afb52453fc&_e=TRXQLS7da2d5kROaj9_Xd7OXHt3jQPnd5Co12XaDrAZaSh3vSvNuPuatITRWjgNLLz4GZY5PAbt7u-4ZKmtQ1lfBFUiPas2nTI6IfzKoqf3fo6YZoEX4I4cozoG8J74F3Eqea-4VC-8huNVWbnyEGRzkEWQfyhjrNdIElV-ZcaMUpHuIHQc4Bye8aMOMhwIewEebaoJhPdLbQ-SdQBaS8T0nQObIczvX36scdLKD8xiDZnLLs_DC5xyr-QA7pUGpQLeTdlmS6YdVjEkHo0BKPIJMotmXCHAA3sX1afsLOHKF8z2HpPPQZGRpQFfrjHij5blIYO6JYqmGuOwVx_tC6ob0PJv8H7OqbGSfVZ6_57dURPkUuPaySVRUBlYp_9tYMW3hOKHO4Mufo99AkOV3cA%3D%3D) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria." | | | We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13. | | In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy... This included putting her on experimental drugs likeLupron , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders... ... Giving her constant testosterone injections... ... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15. How was this allowed to happen? It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?" This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. | | | So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's. | | Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bab9bdfe1c2244629d7398ab1536f68a&_e=W8fi3z1IYhZFY3cCxNgHT34RK6GaV01HUSKdbmp54U7tkQmln5k1p5WI0uLmf2r37ECAwR6sR2ipH8cx603GrPLHKk7WwOWvfUauCjHAMTzS9rPb420flrqbgZ_Htz9Y9oz1hcI_4Sf8Gz7Sj1dMH6mSZA6m4Ec5hQTUOQWmeYD2iNQLX7gpzjCEXtiU0Y-YxL0c0VSx1fSP5SI1AY99USFuBv7CCeYpyBYnMHE6tfyEr9KClqaKNI1alM2Bvq7pWauAwrFMUs0QmJ8M_lUC2HhaVECLh5AsYNWROinh-Rn5Ei1AmYP9RqtCSI-PtCGhOjf7pV7tRmhhyQB4O45BA7GxGW5rq2FsJ3xr-fO5Zk1r7sRRwUB3ThaAh-tBL73B1iM2lNZEi6krTKoiVWKZ8wNJG9_WhkDnKboIkmCFfA9zhZ6FZEtG4beZYTP3ytjy)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bab9bdfe1c2244629d7398ab1536f68a&_e=W8fi3z1IYhZFY3cCxNgHT34RK6GaV01HUSKdbmp54U7tkQmln5k1p5WI0uLmf2r37ECAwR6sR2ipH8cx603GrPLHKk7WwOWvfUauCjHAMTzS9rPb420flrqbgZ_Htz9Y9oz1hcI_4Sf8Gz7Sj1dMH6mSZA6m4Ec5hQTUOQWmeYD2iNQLX7gpzjCEXtiU0Y-YxL0c0VSx1fSP5SI1AY99USFuBv7CCeYpyBYnMHE6tfyEr9KClqaKNI1alM2Bvq7pWauAwrFMUs0QmJ8M_lUC2DpMaycw3E7D3rEKjAigPXxz4SYFmkb6WHQ29V4GkgEtFpkucq4GcVNP-J_C1Fs0seVeGvfoQZ_1WbnmjmDcw422KTUzS-fJ9mngI9asa69kXtJgysUIAfebwiE3HnVHqeFIxHRWku6-X_wqIeHfhOwxdEeQp_AwvuALrJPI8NCt)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bab9bdfe1c2244629d7398ab1536f68a&_e=W8fi3z1IYhZFY3cCxNgHT34RK6GaV01HUSKdbmp54U7tkQmln5k1p5WI0uLmf2r37ECAwR6sR2ipH8cx603GrPLHKk7WwOWvfUauCjHAMTzS9rPb420flrqbgZ_Htz9Y9oz1hcI_4Sf8Gz7Sj1dMH6mSZA6m4Ec5hQTUOQWmeYD2iNQLX7gpzjCEXtiU0Y-YxL0c0VSx1fSP5SI1AY99USFuBv7CCeYpyBYnMHE6tfyEr9KClqaKNI1alM2Bvq7pWauAwrFMUs0QmJ8M_lUC2GA3tUVAUy1DpInZXlqrbloDh6580rE7-3Yt6OLao5DXTk6svMItHyBKRV3MqVJNVlLu-bTQwPQDR-oXTrfulOQMcggQjfKcyqkKOHilw8HTYbhinA185MLuPgqT1DsFSxxx3GFomu3xbnthdF9NRgDc0WunhwAfWeNjoT4aRVaG)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bab9bdfe1c2244629d7398ab1536f68a&_e=W8fi3z1IYhZFY3cCxNgHT34RK6GaV01HUSKdbmp54U7tkQmln5k1p5WI0uLmf2r37ECAwR6sR2ipH8cx603GrPLHKk7WwOWvfUauCjHAMTzS9rPb420flrqbgZ_Htz9Y9oz1hcI_4Sf8Gz7Sj1dMH6mSZA6m4Ec5hQTUOQWmeYD2iNQLX7gpzjCEXtiU0Y-YxL0c0VSx1fSP5SI1AY99USFuBv7CCeYpyBYnMHE6tfyEr9KClqaKNI1alM2Bvq7pWauAwrFMUs0QmJ8M_lUC2FvWCP6HRJ01e7IHwdQEiWxY9dTiifnMy_nDJohsuLmug-8hyjvVxGsA_qLCpzESRux8kmV9YOTsjEGXcKHAe5cPT1XmKJiRgCUT00IfSmqczWmlgmseh-3TcKt11hguNpnkkEY4JEkFM8Y09o71oObEPTBY6-_Su9H0zAdXDFpV).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: American Federation for Children
subject: Families deserve the power to choose
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by American Federation for Children |
body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice! | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2d195b7d56b49cb9935d1c0cc10be53&_e=keqNtIewLVU8ueUovHuLipsjEGVbVDD3SpjltZ-Ql2WPAgLi6Kx6CxWCncrhxJ841f2bigKB0n0hm___E1tPoQ-TpGzDtHWbXvN4NqMpYsPv6nSnrwc1tiDqeXlfspr4IEqHzxL9hUI9mvX8JdN6MmAJTEegyIAPdplCqTiu-u1dhS_9PL42nt2KmoZqT7kl6HnJeljWHcsAEwaALfNTrsj4yPjqucFfYHiUPn1RMsfghq8-39J2Xz_a5iI16DSl9lUGEz3zgXWMc2Y_cP3ZDs4Y1mmZFHMILXM4rIpdsGtmlU3wl_XzLBBWTYcsD4UI9G-2lXRqot8RzXpSO7DbRjypsOd8ZhRIH-hy-0qPGp-NYwc662oqvSyErIsPDSHV)
---
| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling. **That 's why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of everyday Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide. This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we 're RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend?_ **Here is the pledge ...**
---
| | _" I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school."_

This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, we 're RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE! name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv265n3c6kggho7rgluf5vgluu76defa631lpddo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clh66ob2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zam6212qdnst6u5evlhdcm6m06jij2no6nc739l8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clh66ob2c9h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zopesuu6er7a7oh1jh2te12gpev9mp53jpm8uha8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clh66ob2c9h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrhq6gfa7inbgief07m7j2l5072dcur0hk2g0reo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clh66ob2c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)
