subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759114a010044fce96417a7e7dc3be79&_e=yELte4zUUQczG8vVpJLIvlNpYEDZO5G7M_Cf5Wa9GRZW8oLaMQigMi9n7oXiBIFMy0Z3RyQHRSUQ0JI6yN5e2u0yzPM3T3wkYYN4pfcTHp2e7usOVbE-OjJd5_Q4K_jif_pyYzhTiAKHpx6YlwyqHXV2Eor6841oaThqEQENRpO7zrLupJoSoTq5hBFj8SK2zjtWIB4YdOo1OnndLycLRaXBw7egffudNAiPvkh6EF2AaT07lq4v5IFnHKkuwpTCont07SWturwE9IkB0Z8_4lJgKUwgxsgJSZsDZDqClAw%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759114a010044fce96417a7e7dc3be79&_e=yELte4zUUQczG8vVpJLIvlNpYEDZO5G7M_Cf5Wa9GRZW8oLaMQigMi9n7oXiBIFMy0Z3RyQHRSUQ0JI6yN5e2u0yzPM3T3wkYYN4pfcTHp2e7usOVbE-OjJd5_Q4K_jif_pyYzhTiAKHpx6YlwyqHWjlIfFHdpnmoxyvaf_OdyZ9KWR_mjha-dooi5xobAK8ehteItqh4ucg9DyTHLmGG5AcSj45tA2hqFKezQZD8uXMH9dlY-viuBj0s9pFh93D_OwUP1E5VaVyzBe38JMspyOl1aWhnfYVB52qG9m3F78%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759114a010044fce96417a7e7dc3be79&_e=yELte4zUUQczG8vVpJLIvlNpYEDZO5G7M_Cf5Wa9GRZW8oLaMQigMi9n7oXiBIFMy0Z3RyQHRSUQ0JI6yN5e2u0yzPM3T3wkYYN4pfcTHp2e7usOVbE-OjJd5_Q4K_jif_pyYzhTiAKHpx6YlwyqHTpH5OMoKC0bNb2SrQoHj0maZiJ4It_8JT5Z13hIBma8PFoiiuXVql02tsRiyXT21fPr9Ok7DH0RT4C6b1Qc0mLMKWrx-sBlUma0d7wMNHwfUtjXpdHli3HC-1P0bEfaYW7lsez-iWUTa0Fy7CdVv3I%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759114a010044fce96417a7e7dc3be79&_e=yELte4zUUQczG8vVpJLIvlNpYEDZO5G7M_Cf5Wa9GRZW8oLaMQigMi9n7oXiBIFMy0Z3RyQHRSUQ0JI6yN5e2u0yzPM3T3wkYYN4pfcTHp2e7usOVbE-OjJd5_Q4K_jif_pyYzhTiAKHpx6YlwyqHbFMA1Ies3OYg4pIGL2yDkzJnyXFeV5DLZL962rexM_fnISzIJQp6CFJuOdxFqJ3EneuIbXfTdpyg4hJRcHmrFQ0sh06t0NZEEy97bxGIXG-S9EWP6AZXAUCEtOdPdeLlF5hM9-3I72kgXFGYOtpXBQ%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759114a010044fce96417a7e7dc3be79&_e=yELte4zUUQczG8vVpJLIvlNpYEDZO5G7M_Cf5Wa9GRZW8oLaMQigMi9n7oXiBIFMy0Z3RyQHRSUQ0JI6yN5e2u0yzPM3T3wkYYN4pfcTHp2e7usOVbE-OjJd5_Q4K_jif_pyYzhTiAKHpx6YlwyqHSr9oaaEsHk4ROiV020kq88maxzR39zl1H7wz4p04n2XCtwM6zr_YP0cv2GswbEJM9IR12FDXAEhaWPlfbb-58_LVhjs3CAxydXCxFpv3316qdGI7FFvBmZAKtjVeFryozsa3T_hlXApSj41s_IXS1o%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759114a010044fce96417a7e7dc3be79&_e=yELte4zUUQczG8vVpJLIvlNpYEDZO5G7M_Cf5Wa9GRZW8oLaMQigMi9n7oXiBIFMy0Z3RyQHRSUQ0JI6yN5e2u0yzPM3T3wkYYN4pfcTHp2e7usOVbE-OjJd5_Q4K_jif_pyYzhTiAKHpx6YlwyqHVz2SZ4RZSZWxZ97MxEnf3GevpknuOwWQXpo17oNyryc3HnKmFEIcRsOF3LX4QMvLYBFTpWG7A_4CdokOL7xO0zzm5AlNk4khzMJyVt21KA2lRCCDABC_RY2O4_s_ZTDgisKVBlfaD0g7rHaanXkiLY%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759114a010044fce96417a7e7dc3be79&_e=yELte4zUUQczG8vVpJLIvlNpYEDZO5G7M_Cf5Wa9GRZW8oLaMQigMi9n7oXiBIFMy0Z3RyQHRSUQ0JI6yN5e2u0yzPM3T3wkYYN4pfcTHp2e7usOVbE-OjJd5_Q4K_jif_pyYzhTiAKHpx6YlwyqHfR-vhMOFf3qqyXXw6tLW1zcfvVbB5nF0OSoL2p7oAzAo6ILMKHPi6f48R4ilLn1M0OIweRROA2oDLxr4FRU6xHMpr3I1pvGgglQb27KHW4ibOGfxLomrLlilc986BveS8emAl7BD6qlciPCtU2d7Kg%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759114a010044fce96417a7e7dc3be79&_e=yELte4zUUQczG8vVpJLIvlNpYEDZO5G7M_Cf5Wa9GRZW8oLaMQigMi9n7oXiBIFMy0Z3RyQHRSUQ0JI6yN5e2u0yzPM3T3wkYYN4pfcTHp2e7usOVbE-OjJd5_Q4K_jif_pyYzhTiAKHpx6YlwyqHQ6jb8f23-m_Zvm5lsJejIUSwxBCRQsxi81Sx9KsI971yNOaTqvomdDbsGe8u6nGvAe1oqs4a6iaV8eg5tesdrE6MaD3avyNdgQ9egqcDUqz_EWz8M0ExrS6bPvTHBD70HLLaBPG11jrLPmGQuVmFuI%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759114a010044fce96417a7e7dc3be79&_e=yELte4zUUQczG8vVpJLIvlNpYEDZO5G7M_Cf5Wa9GRZW8oLaMQigMi9n7oXiBIFMy0Z3RyQHRSUQ0JI6yN5e2u0yzPM3T3wkYYN4pfcTHp2e7usOVbE-OjJd5_Q4K_ji7Jmdc1R66Qt3x2QIRELXWk-q4OIihncKCrlqoWxxldPNM84a9n1mW7rDWybX3m2MYVKi90QQ4PJxQF-1Jwk5FqmEBIdw0WcZhc6K8nO-nB6Di5eGZ_eN-PUO1mEs9k6372o0yp_u9NK6XP4_ez0Y6wiloTvzP18VaKLOOoNeOec%3D)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759114a010044fce96417a7e7dc3be79&_e=yELte4zUUQczG8vVpJLIvlNpYEDZO5G7M_Cf5Wa9GRZW8oLaMQigMi9n7oXiBIFMy0Z3RyQHRSUQ0JI6yN5e2u0yzPM3T3wkYYN4pfcTHp2e7usOVbE-OjJd5_Q4K_jivESMTo9LLyOFuSEnKAcf7FJCmqXw44WArw09Z63y7zfB7vSGRmi9Ytk1vfRMmqYVsneu6IgmbFmmfzzrppC_I3kZgGx6wkl8x6vPnZ4Az2TlhiaaKbwFcUd3NSdoZoDNLQnHhNlXEQTWEt68PhBYtwkTQsbP-dCiYWBXaUKar84%3D)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759114a010044fce96417a7e7dc3be79&_e=yELte4zUUQczG8vVpJLIvlNpYEDZO5G7M_Cf5Wa9GRZW8oLaMQigMi9n7oXiBIFMy0Z3RyQHRSUQ0JI6yN5e2u0yzPM3T3wkYYN4pfcTHp2e7usOVbE-OjJd5_Q4K_jif_pyYzhTiAKHpx6YlwyqHd3J_gCQsf8VJ47n9O9gaE2U7SaLyu2QUgZG5IZAirKqkFgTSVxDkNduYErA8ObCed6MPwype66yGejM6kD8_LkgDBz5D2sRCDxOS2cA8Wb8IS4fzkW7vYeeiVpNuCEvM3q3tBjm5FBS3I--ttpI0fQ%3D)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

Sent to Full Mag News subscribers.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: The bend toward justice does not happen on its own...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
It moves because people, like you, pull it there.
|
---

Martin Luther King Jr.'s words remain true, but the bend toward justice does not happen on its own -- it moves because people, like you, _pull_ it there.

Since we launched All On The Line, we've seen that path toward justice move closer because of our work together in restoring fairness to our democracy and ensuring that every American has an equal say in our government. We started this year having achieved significant progress, with 75% of the states’ congressional maps considered fair. However, our work remains unfinished as long as remaining states remain gerrymandered, and we must continue this fight until we get rid of all gerrymandering everywhere.
**It's up to us to not only safeguard the progress we have made, but it's time for us to build on that progress and continue our fight for fairness.[We can't reach that point without your support. Will you make a donation to All On The Line?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58266647/390567623/-2130149505?refcode=20230203_AOTL_P_EHHA1_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmOGJkMzViLWFkYTQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=883Qe5fCW9JI5qh_-LSntdemJQPN1AUUbK2N8GMZAJ0=)**

Dr. King's legacy teaches us not to dwell in the shadows of disparity. We must stand at the forefront of the fight against inequality. [**We are in the midst of the civil rights movement of our time. It is up to us to continue bending the arc of justice. History has shown us that we can.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58266658/390567633/-2130149505?refcode=20230203_AOTL_P_EHHA1_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmOGJkMzViLWFkYTQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=883Qe5fCW9JI5qh_-LSntdemJQPN1AUUbK2N8GMZAJ0=)
That is why All On The Line and its affiliates are pressing forward in the fair maps movement by supporting voters who are challenging gerrymandered maps in court. Our teams are mobilizing volunteers across the nation to advocate for more redistricting reforms. And, importantly, we are working to prevent a new wave of radical gerrymandering.
| [**Donate to All On The Line Today**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58266659/390567634/-2130149505?refcode=20230203_AOTL_P_EHHA1_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmOGJkMzViLWFkYTQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=883Qe5fCW9JI5qh_-LSntdemJQPN1AUUbK2N8GMZAJ0=)

It is our duty to continue this fight for the civil rights of all. The best way to honor Dr. King’s legacy is to build upon it. This can’t happen in one day -- it requires continued participation over the course of years and decades. And each year we must recommit ourselves to making his dream a reality.
I firmly believe that we have the capacity to bring about the change that is necessary.
In solidarity,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

name: 1600 Daily
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvtaavfmout77qbrj5l9lsmalh8683f4nkkulvbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clj60o36c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z978cmrmfecggg5hteu1u3o5anota8g8okrgcpb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clj60o36c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z803cak2aomf2oppa36tl3gvdeg6l6jvsj50su7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5clj60o36c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

[ U.S. Secretary of State Antony Blinken has indefinitely postponed his trip to China following the recently confirmed Chinese state-owned balloon flying in United States air space over Montana for potential spying purposes. While the trip was never announced to the public, Blinken was scheduled to travel to Beijing this weekend and meet with President Xi to discuss the ongoing Russia-Ukraine conflict. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3ef45fc94974532809b4a7d476c4771&_e=Gt6IAv3yWSXDufqV9dowHGpKGnCBd-xi_UmLXKNT2BlcLP8Fnm1dE91-WJEjDjnmINGQDX61b9PQk16zmLNv1fDUw6geA27aiKMAUrE6ahqAoPCpIV_mgNgfDcP8EVx2dOp26U6aycHlCpeUwZahWd64UbLM149jk7NDOiHK57GRsKJOOIkubzJwVCOaFXstwtnZXrS8ui28En7oWFthMZJ-RBHf6mR9Lo-sRuCKjS-V2STc_pxkxGrwedW9Zy0_7i4FAigztqf2DJQJsQ9679TSGFpkb15y_NI3dkD9BIo%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3ef45fc94974532809b4a7d476c4771&_e=Gt6IAv3yWSXDufqV9dowHGpKGnCBd-xi_UmLXKNT2BlcLP8Fnm1dE91-WJEjDjnmINGQDX61b9PQk16zmLNv1fDUw6geA27aiKMAUrE6ahqAoPCpIV_mgNgfDcP8EVx2dOp26U6aycHlCpeUwZahWaAUA6adTsWK_TLJWikreBX7Zw7agKvTKzEXQbuMxh_R4pbDzBxpl5VYqGLraTmK-qzDGxyIcKPNe2eXtdQKt_m3wny16Ob59EhbnQY38tggiuh5KBcVStppyR_OfecPZvFvIsXeIEgz-py7cam0pU0%3D)
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3ef45fc94974532809b4a7d476c4771&_e=Gt6IAv3yWSXDufqV9dowHGpKGnCBd-xi_UmLXKNT2BlcLP8Fnm1dE91-WJEjDjnmINGQDX61b9PQk16zmLNv1fDUw6geA27aiKMAUrE6ahqAoPCpIV_mgNgfDcP8EVx2dOp26U6aycHlCpeUwZahWWVwzJ12ywYMqQWNcrmfEdLAhEtzKoGaYIYlSUg9jAqvzgO-W0zJ3acLBKihou5pu7UfX-R7hFjH9DwKHqNMWtwo6r5Y5jLtDt-la7oZkdq1rf-2WV4ao33T_BVaXjNR5EF1mcvY5U62G0bbGyF7onE%3D)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3ef45fc94974532809b4a7d476c4771&_e=Gt6IAv3yWSXDufqV9dowHGpKGnCBd-xi_UmLXKNT2BlcLP8Fnm1dE91-WJEjDjnmINGQDX61b9PQk16zmLNv1fDUw6geA27aiKMAUrE6ahqAoPCpIV_mgNgfDcP8EVx2dOp26U6aycHlCpeUwZahWSTjWiRSNb9V9Zr9np7S6ldM78IlYtDcpH03qGc_syQOx1Tx_Ox26TqMk11-QJhs9BYtCTKPtNTCGJlp1RzkDlgjBwZWDs8GBSGCEKx-F9unotsq1IWiPZ9gHwhT8nt02q4XUzFWYURmB98xRuRony8%3D)
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3ef45fc94974532809b4a7d476c4771&_e=Gt6IAv3yWSXDufqV9dowHGpKGnCBd-xi_UmLXKNT2BlcLP8Fnm1dE91-WJEjDjnmINGQDX61b9PQk16zmLNv1fDUw6geA27aiKMAUrE6ahqAoPCpIV_mgNgfDcP8EVx2dOp26U6aycHlCpeUwZahWQYq04XN3ynkYIc9rxsQzcQ81isQ11QsMw8RlZmrgWfA9bHdJ7aEeU8hiGH9TsWos2bkbuftnmpeXk8VGH4g7U5pc1G-sOX70WtRkxHX1_sctGa7jl0C7n13PGGSteYQ_gBKjwtoTuOjEHZTxjLexN8%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3ef45fc94974532809b4a7d476c4771&_e=Gt6IAv3yWSXDufqV9dowHGpKGnCBd-xi_UmLXKNT2BlcLP8Fnm1dE91-WJEjDjnmINGQDX61b9PQk16zmLNv1fDUw6geA27aiKMAUrE6ahqAoPCpIV_mgNgfDcP8EVx2dOp26U6aycHlCpeUwZahWbWpZmzD7cSzoxwbArBMzbDfbKUlFVa2D_TetQMjqq5cnee5zziggtdics2UVmv_f1zzrB2D7xX8LeCo-V24k4MzKlE9rfZj8PjsgdYhsUs5pxIZHKjBFj8eOcs722KzkcUpFKOXrw_WWD2qX2MJC3s%3D) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

name: Conservatives Give
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e26917e82ae04afa80afa42bba69d659&_e=YPcoV8MpRpmU7T2-fdP3Cn6SgBVpk0nXx0jNJux363WFka9-ROvpeC3pTCcbwweAd2et0UVtu7SxQu3y3QXA7zpTfAQ8h_S3yXzb3VZrqlaYSTseI6XJ2J0xiKbQMdJy3wUCoOLUxA47--wSWXOSscdSbxLLxnptvUWF5CxKBE_p0dILmgTBr35LdipOOU8I-bTmoKZV_YVDlh8Dmlpp8w5wrW8sbAD58bpyxC2LhT2IS63QXqWInUcKK2VKZzRzRmy-JIKWLXScpyJJKDS2UelJoK79jO9dHDmzQh2w-BVxRoLUm719Rm14j7V6Hb0q0yAPUx4llkF7aZ0Sti61KpzLj40D4ADOlIjJZgyvfdeXb_7eb4YjziLaeTNrHpo7jY3CzlWhgJj8VTt0prVlB9rxPox6fwDEcTWhTOGducj5JVcRhZuk-L3op2t3gbnP)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e26917e82ae04afa80afa42bba69d659&_e=YPcoV8MpRpmU7T2-fdP3Cn6SgBVpk0nXx0jNJux363WFka9-ROvpeC3pTCcbwweAd2et0UVtu7SxQu3y3QXA7zpTfAQ8h_S3yXzb3VZrqlaYSTseI6XJ2J0xiKbQMdJy3wUCoOLUxA47--wSWXOSscdSbxLLxnptvUWF5CxKBE_p0dILmgTBr35LdipOOU8I-bTmoKZV_YVDlh8Dmlpp8w5wrW8sbAD58bpyxC2LhT2IS63QXqWInUcKK2VKZzRzRmy-JIKWLXScpyJJKDS2UYlQezaqJtkB5qW4zUvGuTZmS08FpnaK-I7On2e25KVe8WFYaOK08F247TksgXKg0l_ipHmZAEpIL7_g8LJ5LdBtphJOEkXnoomTnuSazbauhZVI2yzIQ2Z4EJfT6WrIWcKr73hImeBT8uwtRYhAC-eRVSqcrwAP_BMbrpoXeR5d)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e26917e82ae04afa80afa42bba69d659&_e=YPcoV8MpRpmU7T2-fdP3Cn6SgBVpk0nXx0jNJux363WFka9-ROvpeC3pTCcbwweAd2et0UVtu7SxQu3y3QXA7zpTfAQ8h_S3yXzb3VZrqlaYSTseI6XJ2J0xiKbQMdJy3wUCoOLUxA47--wSWXOSscdSbxLLxnptvUWF5CxKBE_p0dILmgTBr35LdipOOU8I-bTmoKZV_YVDlh8Dmlpp8w5wrW8sbAD58bpyxC2LhT2IS63QXqWInUcKK2VKZzRzRmy-JIKWLXScpyJJKDS2UUPaqiNZOhpjsvoAZa6hzzQaKXBI_AALbN5rE9temrOoD7yG1Iiwt6T0_TBKFApvqT3Ns9G3hOHv54hmz8lCSOxR1Azhm2F3LSD9CI7FG7jZSaoaF55tEjCg2CfIYd1NITBqxRXnAjeIGDVSR1fxrnaL6lEOlOnJUoO1G45VLYNr)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e26917e82ae04afa80afa42bba69d659&_e=YPcoV8MpRpmU7T2-fdP3Cn6SgBVpk0nXx0jNJux363WFka9-ROvpeC3pTCcbwweAd2et0UVtu7SxQu3y3QXA7zpTfAQ8h_S3yXzb3VZrqlaYSTseI6XJ2J0xiKbQMdJy3wUCoOLUxA47--wSWXOSscdSbxLLxnptvUWF5CxKBE_p0dILmgTBr35LdipOOU8I-bTmoKZV_YVDlh8Dmlpp8w5wrW8sbAD58bpyxC2LhT2IS63QXqWInUcKK2VKZzRzRmy-JIKWLXScpyJJKDS2UZxB2lXrawJEos9XHBKZsojbdEBgRaQl2cU9jy_D2u9AUpF1CBCGTzCINdD1x42uu38Qqv6jycoId211pcsjnPub-0N1FXCADBJCQOWN2hjSzuUADcfRaanocSZf1NZVJFFzsTHXclwFjWaPTMvMWxFKSykjPQ28aeURmQaibojm).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

| | As we celebrate Black History Month, I’d like to take a moment to recognize and celebrate the contributions that the Black community has made here in my district and across Nevada. This month, we’re remembering Black Americans who have made lasting impacts on our community and continue to shape our country today. From Civil Rights leaders who pushed our country to live up to our promise of equality, to the trailblazers and community activists who continue to pave the path forward. They have left a long-lasting legacy in Nevada and show the strength, resilience, and determination of the Black community. While celebrating Black History Month, we must also acknowledge the systemic injustices that Black Americans continue to face. I am determined to do all I can to safeguard equal rights and protections under the law. This Black History Month, we must reaffirm our fight for justice and equity for all. With you, Susie Lee

**Friend, as the State of the Union address approaches, we've selected 500 Democrats to participate in our exclusive Presidential Approval Poll — including you.**

_Please respond now:_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58268503/390573800/1933062440?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3911-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDVhNmU0NC1iMmE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R-HLeVw4XJptbS0frDiKqho8C83m4zxn7hozm6YW3uI=&emci=9c40d3cd-62a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=e05a6e44-b2a4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
Friend, President Biden has spent the first two years of his administration delivering _huge_ wins for American families:
* He secured **a landmark infrastructure deal** that will rebuild our crumbling roads and invest in rural communities.

* He successfully led the passage of **the Inflation Reduction Act,** a massive bill that will help families struggling with the impact of inflation and jump-start our fight against climate change.

* He rebuilt our economy from the wreckage of the Trump administration and **secured the lowest unemployment rate in decades.**

* And just last fall, he **led Democrats to HISTORIC wins** during the 2022 midterm elections.

When President Biden addresses Congress and American families across the country in just a few days, he'll lay out his agenda for the coming year. **This is a crucial moment for Democrats to rally behind President Biden — and that's why we're counting on your response to our live poll.**

clean_body: | | | Friend, as the State of the Union address approaches, we've selected 500 Democrats to participate in our exclusive Presidential Approval Poll — including you. Please respond now: Friend, President Biden has spent the first two years of his administration delivering huge wins for American families: He secured a landmark infrastructure deal that will rebuild our crumbling roads and invest in rural communities. He successfully led the passage of the Inflation Reduction Act, a massive bill that will help families struggling with the impact of inflation and jump-start our fight against climate change. He rebuilt our economy from the wreckage of the Trump administration and secured the lowest unemployment rate in decades. And just last fall, he led Democrats to HISTORIC wins during the 2022 midterm elections. When President Biden addresses Congress and American families across the country in just a few days, he'll lay out his agenda for the coming year. This is a crucial moment for Democrats to rally behind President Biden — and that's why we're counting on your response to our live poll. Please, before these links expire at 11:59 p.m. tonight, respond to tell President Biden that you have his back: Do you approve of President Biden? | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a0d8ea3540c40c2a226d5061cfbf197&_e=S8kVGHVYblIlYguqcvH-upLUjb1-0N_-Aq96LZPddFNOlyB6PlGzY70mP3ehikBuDn4IbJvbMD70jLRnyMqhP1GM7oMbyi-Y_EMpoRII9APA0u0bFauoX4QexJ-S7syCMfRxnAjqjUuT_zQxL6QxaE3lBohodk7hh4pstGeDWqQMg0UD3Zru4p8sHqaSBzQPRVi8JgMxr28MtuZWHHWath41OfPUjZg6knY75xSieU69Snx4xP2vLT-rKWZp3nKnE-lngWN7IXSVYV5Egju6rOvQJhgP9BkdkQHUd_tma48%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a0d8ea3540c40c2a226d5061cfbf197&_e=S8kVGHVYblIlYguqcvH-upLUjb1-0N_-Aq96LZPddFNOlyB6PlGzY70mP3ehikBuDn4IbJvbMD70jLRnyMqhP1GM7oMbyi-Y_EMpoRII9APA0u0bFauoX4QexJ-S7syCMfRxnAjqjUuT_zQxL6QxaFHCI9RJv0uIni_R5K2feOKKcTSX2MIibhCvGH2g2_PimMabxPNUWmKTzcJBTiv7ewLkBAfm0bglbLoXt4QhUS2duqB9cDe7UjTeoAaor2EA7_cCBAf_T-Dh_LqZqOX4h8xrdixaSjmUwM0TZNtTBuU%3D)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a0d8ea3540c40c2a226d5061cfbf197&_e=S8kVGHVYblIlYguqcvH-upLUjb1-0N_-Aq96LZPddFNOlyB6PlGzY70mP3ehikBuDn4IbJvbMD70jLRnyMqhP1GM7oMbyi-Y_EMpoRII9APA0u0bFauoX4QexJ-S7syCMfRxnAjqjUuT_zQxL6QxaAeOtb4sc2lpECn328h94gwARuuXLECRY5MuT35bHkU3nRNmgjn_-6ZaC2aZACbKAj80cEyxcCM5nfs4Hws9GGeoesB1c3sVh-QP2q4A_z4vguInqtv8VQ2hMICZQyZAM6DSm5QjB6F3fd5S4uWgmDI%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a0d8ea3540c40c2a226d5061cfbf197&_e=S8kVGHVYblIlYguqcvH-upLUjb1-0N_-Aq96LZPddFNOlyB6PlGzY70mP3ehikBuDn4IbJvbMD70jLRnyMqhP1GM7oMbyi-Y_EMpoRII9APA0u0bFauoX4QexJ-S7syCMfRxnAjqjUuT_zQxL6QxaG44x7MQxvoOd2HLMszOWYhUFj_6D2_q4CzDUA6JYkwDAcRVehTHVyRqPFMjbB8y4Thef6ZYhCJUxN32FcCtZbBTWAMkFTr0QLUyJG3d2WQ80MeN60Uq5sddcpe9Ax16FZLIDiG1LnEb9FWmfbY2HyA%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a0d8ea3540c40c2a226d5061cfbf197&_e=S8kVGHVYblIlYguqcvH-upLUjb1-0N_-Aq96LZPddFNOlyB6PlGzY70mP3ehikBuDn4IbJvbMD70jLRnyMqhP1GM7oMbyi-Y_EMpoRII9APA0u0bFauoX4QexJ-S7syCMfRxnAjqjUuT_zQxL6QxaHprFK7_8UZcnEOjkVatQhVN1WEqXBCONDB4F_bJZ2OaqCZ2uwZ60S3LbmnChD_Z1XgdV9Fljgo3PkMV0JXqXRo8E9-MjbjIuCDyfNsgvpiBu8m1-FezUC45ooDvjnPM42p0hPp2tZKI4cx_bqHfh0Q%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a0d8ea3540c40c2a226d5061cfbf197&_e=S8kVGHVYblIlYguqcvH-upLUjb1-0N_-Aq96LZPddFNOlyB6PlGzY70mP3ehikBuDn4IbJvbMD70jLRnyMqhP1GM7oMbyi-Y_EMpoRII9APA0u0bFauoX4QexJ-S7syCMfRxnAjqjUuT_zQxL6QxaCeieHWU65VsftZsEcpQENHcvhn4qAUh2SjX1pKuFj4ZP-2xd47a285cor1xOJ9uYmYg41Y_UG0eUMvMsGpPVkwxZPOWhe1GsyFy3fDFyj7DtEexd8ZKwxd0CNPAmjhL0gil_yIgSsWK5JOQGYst1Rs%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a0d8ea3540c40c2a226d5061cfbf197&_e=S8kVGHVYblIlYguqcvH-upLUjb1-0N_-Aq96LZPddFNOlyB6PlGzY70mP3ehikBuDn4IbJvbMD70jLRnyMqhP1GM7oMbyi-Y_EMpoRII9APA0u0bFauoX4QexJ-S7syCMfRxnAjqjUuT_zQxL6QxaDib1ElnzSppWQ-jfKAkvHOCeH9FiCgzeEPCbdNTLp8uBb8XxjUsNf_Yz54stEAb8-nxxWi0ZILxOJUcdQE2duwDuvY5-tDvH_ogu7dGD8THJ006G3EGtwbfqqrJ7osgIg8KgE2sHZwJV0uNqbvsUnY%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a0d8ea3540c40c2a226d5061cfbf197&_e=S8kVGHVYblIlYguqcvH-upLUjb1-0N_-Aq96LZPddFNOlyB6PlGzY70mP3ehikBuDn4IbJvbMD70jLRnyMqhP1GM7oMbyi-Y_EMpoRII9APA0u0bFauoX4QexJ-S7syCMfRxnAjqjUuT_zQxL6QxaCE6lx6je_ixKv6Acayc1KXSuzDOyiAqtwVNCYmMgrj3VEpX2-59JRHoRAIa9lHDIrKsR3OAntjQkHQWa5ScIVQp_EKd0ojbcc17dWSZ5KvGwIVn1CNPP0qOFX5yx_XE8UCfljVz7t-LBxj6xnPbmYo%3D)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5a0d8ea3540c40c2a226d5061cfbf197&_e=S8kVGHVYblIlYguqcvH-upLUjb1-0N_-Aq96LZPddFNOlyB6PlGzY70mP3ehikBuDn4IbJvbMD70jLRnyMqhP1GM7oMbyi-Y_EMpoRII9APA0u0bFauoX4QexJ-S7syCx5VDjiU8rlX0hmuZbsBg8AozLRzDaMTqG5hZ77uIHvHwvU_HPNrvem4sAQQxKYWeJ0bc1Beb5-TO30KEBfvsNRiw1dvzQatdxUxWqTOGHjJ0VHx420jkM-_UOIXMfvjNuDi0EG9bHETl00Y_-JxIS4dwGpaF7C9ggMOYg2j8SO4%3D)

clean_body: Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I’ll share my story ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I’ve dealt with racism... I’ve even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I’m not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: When big business goes ‘woke’ – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132792?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Why do some firms go ‘woke’? **Disney recently got embroiled in a row about transgender identity in kindergartens. Why would anyone think that that was a good idea for a family friendly business?

A couple of years before then, Gillette ran a campaign about ‘toxic masculinity’. What made a company that sells shaving products to millions of men think that was a smart move? (It wasn’t. Gillette dropped the campaign and was reported to have undergone a massive write down).
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=758ed69188&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click above to reserve your ticket to this event!_**
| Yesterday, I read that the CEO of BP was planning to dial back investments in wind and solar to focus more on oil and gas. **How did a company called British “Petroleum”, get into a position where it was being defensive about petroleum production in the first place?**

Corporate executives make decisions for all sorts of reasons. We just don’t know the full story behind what happened at any of these firms. **But what we do know is that a growing number of people fear that big business is coming under pressure from investment funds to make decisions that are not purely based on maximizing returns.**

**Over the past few years so-called Environmental, Social & Governance investing – or ESG – has become established orthodoxy on Wall Street.** Big investment firms have devised various metrics by which they measure corporate performance that are not necessarily related primarily to profitability.

**What, they want to know, is the business in which they invest doing to promote diversity? How is the board looking to combat climate change? Is the business inclusive enough? **

If large investment firms make their investments conditional upon meeting these kinds of metrics, those that run the business will do what they can to comply. **I worry that pressure from ESG investors has made a lot of corporate America ‘woke’.**

“So what?” you might say. “It’s not your money, Carswell. It’s up to these investment funds to invest any way they want."

**In a free market, we should not tell those that own capital how they might invest it. The trouble is that the ESG investment firms on Wall Street don’t generally own the capital. They merely manage it.**

Investment managers have what is known as a fiduciary duty to those that invest in their funds – be they small retail investors or a large pension fund. **A key part of that fiduciary duty is to aim to maximize returns for their investors.**

**When the high-flying CEO of a large Wall Street investment fund, hot off the plane from Davos, decides to disinvest from oil and gas in order to save the planet, are they fulfilling their obligation to maximize returns? **Or, in pursuit of what is essentially a political agenda, are these large money managers, forgetting their fiduciary responsibilities?

We should have no problem with an investment firm wanting to invest any way it wants – provided they make it clear to their own investors if and when they are not aiming to maximize returns.

**To try to tackle this problem in the US Congress, Rep Bryan Steil has introduced the ‘Putting Investors First Act’.** This is a sensible solution that every conservative ought to be able to support at a federal level. But what should conservatives seek to do to address this issue at a state level?

**Here in Mississippi, state Senator Chad McMahan’s bill (SB 2849) is a great local solution.** His bill clarifies the fiduciary duty of Mississippi’s Public Employees’ Retirement System board, making sure that the board sticks to maximizing returns and ensuring the safety of investments. It is encouraging to see his bill make progress through the Mississippi Senate.

I believe this is a good, conservative approach. An additional guardrail for PERS will help ensure the safety of money invested on behalf of our teachers, law enforcement officers and other public servants.

What possible justification is there for not wanting to ensure that those that run a state’s Public Employee Retirement System maximize returns? A bill that puts investors first and maximizes returns seems like an ideal solution.

**Mississippi lawmakers have an opportunity to tackle ‘woke’ corporations. Let’s hope they take it. **

Have a great weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1bb355b379&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
| **_Ps. I hope you will join us at our lunch to hear about the need for a Women’s Bill of Rights? Click [here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c8d6d232b8&e=5703353baa) to reserve your place soon as tickets will go fast. _**
---
|
---
| | _ _

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

Want to change how you receive these emails?

name: Team Gaetz
subject: POLL: Should we keep the CSPAN cameras in Congress?
body:
Matt wants some feedback on this.
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001337fAHF-61yzNIDiN0gkX8MUC_8AulZvzL5gsj_BVHUKm4jgnpnf1-104RcyMzPm80mBfamGBkkCzPOpjCyyOnrH1P82hxxseWlWHLhUk2VdhQ2R6gjngaIo4IaHs5IvVMS3B8Pr7aGDVP7W9GJJkkqA4hdiIbEd3ThivsLuXHAYjc-YQCcItdLGHjEkrxlUEP7nRQPaamrXIuBbK6fX7g==&c=iPeHM70yEA3468TNj7OeTHYaUMjWhousXjvGXS_2ThQP10yM-kC2Nw==&ch=_h9gw44er9mtz_lGn3xniVPqjnaNaKYjjk-RdEW_OqjDUti2ALap7w==)
---
| Peter,
---
| When CSPAN cameras were live broadcasting House floor proceedings during the Speaker vote, the American People were able to see in real time how our government is functioning, what alliances were being created, what discussions were being had, and what animated moments drove the action.
DO YOU THINK WE SHOULD KEEP THOSE CAMERAS AND LET AMERICANS SEE WHAT REALLY GOES ON IN CONGRESS?
---
| | [YES, KEEP THE CAMERAS! ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001337fAHF-61yzNIDiN0gkX8MUC_8AulZvzL5gsj_BVHUKm4jgnpnf1-104RcyMzPm80mBfamGBkkCzPOpjCyyOnrH1P82hxxseWlWHLhUk2VdhQ2R6gjngaIo4IaHs5IvVMS3B8Pr7aGDVP7W9GJJkkqA4hdiIbEd3ThivsLuXHAYjc-YQCcItdLGHjEkrxlUEP7nRQPaamrXIuBbK6fX7g==&c=iPeHM70yEA3468TNj7OeTHYaUMjWhousXjvGXS_2ThQP10yM-kC2Nw==&ch=_h9gw44er9mtz_lGn3xniVPqjnaNaKYjjk-RdEW_OqjDUti2ALap7w==)
---
| | [NO, DITCH THE CAMERAS ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001337fAHF-61yzNIDiN0gkX8MUC_8AulZvzL5gsj_BVHUKm4jgnpnf1-104RcyMzPm80mBfamGBkkCzPOpjCyyOnrH1P82hxxseWlWHLhUk2VdhQ2R6gjngaIo4IaHs5IvVMS3B8Pr7aGDVP7W9GJJkkqA4hdiIbEd3ThivsLuXHAYjc-YQCcItdLGHjEkrxlUEP7nRQPaamrXIuBbK6fX7g==&c=iPeHM70yEA3468TNj7OeTHYaUMjWhousXjvGXS_2ThQP10yM-kC2Nw==&ch=_h9gw44er9mtz_lGn3xniVPqjnaNaKYjjk-RdEW_OqjDUti2ALap7w==)
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001337fAHF-61yzNIDiN0gkX8MUC_8AulZvzL5gsj_BVHUKm4jgnpnf1-104RcyMzPm80mBfamGBkkCzPOpjCyyOnrH1P82hxxseWlWHLhUk2VdhQ2R6gjngaIo4IaHs5IvVMS3B8Pr7aGDVP7W9GJJkkqA4hdiIbEd3ThivsLuXHAYjc-YQCcItdLGHjEkrxlUEP7nRQPaamrXIuBbK6fX7g==&c=iPeHM70yEA3468TNj7OeTHYaUMjWhousXjvGXS_2ThQP10yM-kC2Nw==&ch=_h9gw44er9mtz_lGn3xniVPqjnaNaKYjjk-RdEW_OqjDUti2ALap7w==)
---
| Peter, Matt Gaetz knows this move would mean one thing for certain - MORE TRANSPARENCY IN WASHINGTON.
You would even be able to see what members of Congress don't actually show up to vote half the time!
But Peter, that's exactly why some (*cough* Paul Ryan) don't want Americans to get any insight into the process.
So we're reaching out to show Matt and the rest of Washington what the public has to say...
DO YOU THINK WE SHOULD KEEP THE CSPAN CAMERAS ON AND LET AMERICANS SEE WHAT REALLY GOES ON IN CONGRESS?
---
| | [YES, KEEP THE CAMERAS! ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001337fAHF-61yzNIDiN0gkX8MUC_8AulZvzL5gsj_BVHUKm4jgnpnf1-104RcyMzPm80mBfamGBkkCzPOpjCyyOnrH1P82hxxseWlWHLhUk2VdhQ2R6gjngaIo4IaHs5IvVMS3B8Pr7aGDVP7W9GJJkkqA4hdiIbEd3ThivsLuXHAYjc-YQCcItdLGHjEkrxlUEP7nRQPaamrXIuBbK6fX7g==&c=iPeHM70yEA3468TNj7OeTHYaUMjWhousXjvGXS_2ThQP10yM-kC2Nw==&ch=_h9gw44er9mtz_lGn3xniVPqjnaNaKYjjk-RdEW_OqjDUti2ALap7w==)
---
| | [NO, DITCH THE CAMERAS ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001337fAHF-61yzNIDiN0gkX8MUC_8AulZvzL5gsj_BVHUKm4jgnpnf1-104RcyMzPm80mBfamGBkkCzPOpjCyyOnrH1P82hxxseWlWHLhUk2VdhQ2R6gjngaIo4IaHs5IvVMS3B8Pr7aGDVP7W9GJJkkqA4hdiIbEd3ThivsLuXHAYjc-YQCcItdLGHjEkrxlUEP7nRQPaamrXIuBbK6fX7g==&c=iPeHM70yEA3468TNj7OeTHYaUMjWhousXjvGXS_2ThQP10yM-kC2Nw==&ch=_h9gw44er9mtz_lGn3xniVPqjnaNaKYjjk-RdEW_OqjDUti2ALap7w==)
---
|
Thanks for your timely response,
---
| Team Gaetz

body:
Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _

Kevin McCarthy kept his word, Friends. **After 4 proud years of service, I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee.** I want to be perfectly clear: This political stunt is a personal one — the result of years of xenophobic, Islamophobic, and racist attacks that started the moment I was elected. The far-right have spent millions of dollars in campaign ads against our movement stoking fear and division, and a constant stream of hateful and violent rhetoric has led to hundreds of death threats against me and my family. Now, in their latest move, they've attempted to silence my voice and begin undoing the incredible progress our movement has helped make both at home and abroad. I'm here to tell you that's not going to happen. **My commitment to justice for all people across the globe — no matter their race, religion, nationality, or anything else — does not begin or end with a committee assignment.** The simple truth is that McCarthy's actions to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee does absolutely nothing to address the issues our constituents deal with at home, or to promote the well-being of people around the world. What it does is further enable his party's hatred and corruption, and promote fear and violence against Somali-Americans, Muslims, immigrants, and anyone else who shares my identity all across the country. We already know that these attacks are just beginning, which is why it's so important that our progressive movement stays united, and is ready and able to fight back. So please: [_**Will you split a contribution — of $25 or any amount you can — between our campaign and Eric's so we have the resources required to stand up to Kevin McCarthy and his far-right Republican allies? name: Andy Kim
subject: I’ll always fight for Social Security and Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Social Security and Medicare work. These programs have kept millions of seniors out of poverty for decades. They're immensely popular for good reason.

Yet year after year, Washington Republicans target Social Security and Medicare.

Now they're using the debt ceiling as an excuse to gut these programs, holding seniors and our country hostage. Congressional Republican leaders have already shown that they'll grind our entire government to a halt to get their way.

I have and will always fight to protect the promises we make to seniors when they pay into Social Security and Medicare.

Our grassroots movement is about serving and looking out for one another – that includes protections and improvements for Social Security and Medicare. Every hard working American deserves to retire with dignity.

With your help, I know we can protect seniors' retirement, and two important programs that have the ability to benefit seniors, our kids, and generations to come.

With hope and gratitude,

Andy

body:
We can’t let these toss-ups land red.

|
---
Derek, Every year in the Commonwealth is an election year, which means we work all year round. This year all 140 seats in the General Assembly are on the ballot and there are 11 toss-ups that will be key targets this fall. Each race is critical, just last week we saw our state Senate, with a slim 22-18 majority, block **THREE BILLS BANNING ABORTION**. The GOP tried three separate times to implement restrictive abortion bans, and Virginia Dems held the line. If we lose our majority this year – the GOP will have a clear path to an abortion ban in the Commonwealth. **[We’re not going to lay down and let them win, and you shouldn’t either! If we lose our majority this year – the GOP will have a clear path to an abortion ban in the Commonwealth. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=****** We’re ready to do the work; knock on every door, make every call, and fire up every Democrat to protect our rights and defend our fellow Virginians but we can’t do it without support from folks like you. =** VADEMS [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58259835/390542996/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGY2NDRiOS05Y2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKk0yml7XV1bhKJa8KBM0HzFrIonyfJf2O8DN2y9M-I=)
Hi there — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! If you have a minute or two today, I wanted to take a moment to tell you a little more about myself, why I ran for U.S. Senate, and why our campaign in Wisconsin is so important. When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents who raised me began to look for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future. However, because of my previous illness, they couldn’t find such a policy. Not from _any_ insurer. Not at _any_ price. They had to pay for my healthcare out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child who had been labeled with those words:**“pre-existing condition.”** I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that. **Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, many of us could be denied coverage.** Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed that health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plans up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need. So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans launch a new attack on our healthcare or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions. They’ve spent years playing politics with people’s lives. **And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules.** I’ll never back down, folks, but we’ve got a tough fight ahead of us to protect this seat, so I’ll need your support every step of the way. [**Will you split a donation today between my campaign in Wisconsin and Michael Bennet? I’ll never stop fighting to ensure every American has access to quality, affordable healthcare — regardless of whether or not they have a pre-existing condition — and it’d mean a lot to me to have your support in that fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58259837/390542998/-358576059?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_NO_20230204_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGY2NDRiOS05Y2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKk0yml7XV1bhKJa8KBM0HzFrIonyfJf2O8DN2y9M-I=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Tammy Baldwin & Michael Bennet will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58259841/390543000/-358576059?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_NO_20230204_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGY2NDRiOS05Y2E0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKk0yml7XV1bhKJa8KBM0HzFrIonyfJf2O8DN2y9M-I=)******

My own personal experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable healthcare coverage, and stand up against those who want to take it away.
Thank you for reading, and thanks for your support today.
— Tammy

Thank you for reading, and thanks for your support today. — Tammy Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Montana’s GOP hopes their midterm surge will carry over to unseating Jon Tester, a practical, reliable, loyal Democrat who faithfully represents his constituents. We need to have Tester’s back.
body:
GOP Senate pickup?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T05a1bdc4-a6f8-4987-aa23-605916cd83c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _It’s a race we can't afford to lose in 2024, or we lose the Senate._ _[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb8d25b6-4a27-48cc-8e23-0886f8352822/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ _Senator Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana. _**_Tester has been everything you'd hope for as a Senator from a bright red state running as a Democrat._** He breaks with us on some issues where he has to represent his constituents. [**_Will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2d84a78-6a90-4096-879b-d0f05a6fac4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_But whether it's key national issues like codifying choice or passing universal background checks on guns, or joining us on defining legislation such as the COVID stimulus & Inflation Reduction Acts, there is just never any question Jon Tester will be there, behind us 100%._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00e292f2-710e-463a-aa75-86bd006c1480/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _No huffing and puffing his chest for the cameras. No negotiating on Meet The Press, or, worse, FoxNews. No attacking his own party or bragging about how much he disagrees with it. In other words, the anti-Joe Manchin._ **_Tester, like Manchin, comes from an overwhelming Trump state. Trump won Montana by 20% in 2016, yet Tester still stood up for his progressive values--FOR US--and was reelected in 2018 on his record and very Montana-esque being. He's perfect for the state, and perfect for the Democratic Party._** **_If we don't re-elect Tester, we will lose the Senate._** It's that simple. _And if we don't reward Tester for taking bold, progressive stands, even knowing he'll have to overcome the HUGE Trump lean of his state, then we can expect future Democrats from states like Montana to all be Joe Manchins._ A disaster. [**_So will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T876e6584-23bd-4755-82ad-dfabc1d9f991/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us reelect the good ones in hostile electoral territory._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td63b8a0d-098a-44cc-8bfe-858097c81b96/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe0e4a36-380e-4441-9f64-f8785a4b22b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Giffords
subject: The Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is commonsense legislation that will save lives
#

Friends -
This week, the Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2023 was introduced in the House of Representatives.
This legislation would require a background check for all gun sales and transfers, with reasonable exceptions for self-defense, law enforcement, hunting/target shooting, and exchanges between family members.
Beginning at our founding ten years ago, Giffords has been focused on working towards a future with universal background checks. This is commonsense legislation that will save lives.
Since 1994, over **_three million**_ illegal gun sales have been stopped due to a background check. That’s three million guns that could have ended up in the wrong hands.
The overwhelming majority of Americans—Democrats, Republicans, and gun owners alike—support background checks. But with a Republican majority in the House of Representatives and a narrowly divided Senate, getting this legislation passed won’t be easy.
That’s why we’re counting on you. [**Will you make a contribution to Giffords PAC so we can help pass the Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2023?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230204-1-15&t=1&akid=4218%2E3935704%2EZ4ReH1)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Bristol Bay
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We’ve been working toward this for 10 years.
#
Derek -
Earlier this week, Joe Biden’s Environmental Protection Agency blocked the development of a gold and copper mine in Bristol Bay, Alaska.
Why is this important?
We’ve been working toward this for 10 years.
Every summer, hundreds of Veterans head to Bristol Bay to earn a living as commercial fishermen. It’s not easy for them and it separates them from their families — again — but it pays well and takes care of things back home.
Unfortunately, there were some mining companies with connections to the Koch Brothers that wanted to dig a mine near the bay that would destroy those jobs and lay waste to the environment.
We worked to help tens of thousands of Veterans, Military family members and those who support them submit letters to the EPA as a part of a coalition to stop that mine development.
We elevated the voices of Iraq war veterans who made a living as commercial fishermen there, and a Kosovo Veteran who operated a lodge near the proposed facility for more than three decades.
And this week, we won.
**Victories like this supporting Veterans are part of the often unseen work we do at VoteVets. Wins that sometimes take years to happen and are funded, in part, by donations from people like you. Help us keep up that work for years to come.**
[**Can you please make a $3 donation to sustain VoteVets' work fighting for Veterans like this for the long haul. It’d mean the world.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/4236?c0=vv-pac-em-feb23.3UW0xW&refcode=em230204-1-15&t=1&akid=7330%2E3013755%2EbRhwGl)

| | | Speaker (barely) of the House Kevin McCarthy is threatening America with default unless Republican budget demands are met. But [he refuses to show an actual budget](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a80a833-4e99-4a4c-98cb-8cd304d84064/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) saying what those demands are!

**How are Democrats supposed to negotiate with a blank page?**

McCarthy appears too scared to put the demands of his lunatic Republican caucus on paper, knowing the numbers simply don't add up. But if this is the case, he needs to stop making threats, get out of the way, and let the adults lead.

[**He needs to put up or shut up.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ecea5e9-ab87-4fc3-a729-7a3a3a55e807/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Team -- **Today is _officially_ National Thank a Mail Carrier Day**, and we need _YOUR_ help to make it memorable for our nation’s postal worker heroes!

The hundreds of thousands of employees of the USPS _always_ get the job done -- even in the face of rain, snow, and _**endless attacks on the postal service from Trump and far-right Republicans.**_

To celebrate this holiday, we’re collecting signatures for a MASSIVE thank-you card for USPS workers to show them how much the American people appreciate their hard work.

**But our records show that you _still_ haven't signed the card, and we need 50,000 signatures before midnight! So please:**

body:
This is why we have to ask for your help:
#

Peter -
This is why we have to ask for your help:
Kyrsten Sinema just filed her latest campaign finance report. She raised almost $1 million. Look at these stats:
* $110,000 from Corporate PACs
* More than $250,000 from private equity
* Just 2 percent of her money from small-dollar donors

The overwhelming majority of the money we raise comes from people giving small-donations. But that money doesn’t just happen without asking — and most of it comes from emails like this.
So that means from time-to-time, when you can afford a few bucks, we really need you to chip in. We’re hoping given this information, you’ll make today one of those days.

But if we fall short in this donor drive, we could see the DNC lose faith in Georgia and watch their investment dry up! [**_Don’t let that happen – rush a donation now!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58263655/390556940/710125701?refcode=20230204.1_PSD_2E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzZiNTViNy1hNGE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dq9NzYCLnePIREseDxO-wuPSVasvK_BiVOccNuM3PoM=)

Thank you for believing in Georgia, Peter,

GA Dems
