name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS: Inside the DNC, Stand with Ilhan, Action for Tyre, Raise the Wage, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Chairman Bernie | Ban Dark Money | Larry Cohen: Inside Strategy
| State Party Wins! | Raise the Wage w/ Ro Khanna | Stand With Ilhan |
Speak Out on Medical Debt | Action for Tyre Nichols | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1011&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

NEW STICKER! As the new Chairman of HELP (healthcare, education, labor,
and pensions), Bernie Sanders is taking on corporate greed and Big Pharma
is already fighting back.

Claim your Chairman Sanders sticker with a one-time donation of $10 — or
become a member with a $5 recurring gift to invest in our work to carry
out Bernie’s vision.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8289?t=1012&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]CLAIM YOUR STICKER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1013&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

Join us Monday, Feb. 13th when US Rep. Pramila Jayapal will join our
National Organize-to-Win Call to talk about what Biden can do with the
power of the pen to advance our priorities. And, stay tuned for other
special guests!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1014&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1015&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

AN INSIDE LOOK AT OUR INSIDE STRATEGY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1016&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen had [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8321?t=1017&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]choice words for the DNC
ahead of today’s Winter Meeting in Philadelphia, where our growing
progressive bloc is pushing to ban dark money from primaries.

Larry, a longtime labor leader and party reformer, laid out the stakes on
our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1018&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]National Organize-to-Win Call on Monday.

“If we don’t get the dirty money out, it becomes increasingly impossible
to elect the grassroots challengers,” Larry said. “It’s not just about the
rulers, it’s also the rules.”

“For those of us who believe we must fight in every possible way to
advance progressive issues and win real power, we ignore party reform at
our peril,” Larry wrote in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8293?t=1019&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]In These Times.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1020&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

Congratulations to two new progressive state party chairs: Shasti Conrad,
a former Bernie staffer, was just elected Washington State Party Chair!
And, union organizer Yolanda Bejarano won a contested race for Arizona
State Party Chair!

Yolanda had the backing of Ruben Gallego, who is challenging Kyrsten
Sinema in 2024; and progressives swept 10 of the 10 seats they ran for on
the AZ State Party Executive Board!

“We now have a working progressive majority in the Arizona Dem Party, Our
Revolution PDA-AZ Leader Dan O’Neal was excited to announce on our
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1021&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]broadcast. “It’s all about winning and it’s all about power!”

Progressives now hold leadership positions in 20 state parties, and we’re
building out power state by state.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1022&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

We cannot cede this ground to the corporate wing. We will be fighting for
progressive leaders in other state parties around the country in the
coming months, like Nevada, Florida, and Oregon.

Join our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8227?t=1023&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]Party Transformation Team to root out dark money and help us
grow and organize our ranks as a powerful force within the party!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8227?t=1024&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]JOIN THE TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1025&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

RAISE THE WAGE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1026&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

On our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8322?t=1027&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]National Organizing Call on Monday, Our Revolution super-member
Ro Khanna spoke on our joint work to raise wages and laid out his vision
for a new economic patriotism in America.

As he wrote in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8323?t=1028&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]Newsweek, this is a plan to bring back production and
good jobs in America, working with labor, investing in our workforce, and
rebuilding our communities.

“We have a moonshot for economic renewal that is desperately needed,” he
said. “And, it’s got to be coupled with Medicare for All, free public
college, childcare... so people can afford to be part of the economy.”

“It was Dr. King who said it was criminal to pay someone starvation wages,
and here we are 50 years later,” Ro said. “No one should be making $2.13
on a tipped wage in modern-day America — that’s what Our Revolution and
One Fair Wage are fighting against.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1029&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

That’s right. We’re partnering with One Fair Wage to end the subminimum
wage for tipped workers in 13 states — because feeding your kids shouldn’t
depend on the kindness of strangers.

Not only are we pressuring elected officials, but we’re also taking on the
National Restaurant Association — exposed by the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8256?t=1030&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]NYT for using $25M in
workers’ own money to lobby against their wages!

Our Revolution Maryland activists were featured protesting the ‘Other NRA’
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8324?t=1031&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]in Bernie’s new video on our campaign to raise wages and not leave
tipped workers behind!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1032&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

All elected officials must reject dirty money from ‘Other NRA’ which has
used this scheme to stagnate the federal minimum wage at $7.25/hr since
2009 and the federal tipped wage at $2.13/hr since 1991!

US Rep. Ro Khanna was the first to sign our NO NRA Money pledge, and
others like Rep. Greg Casar and Sen. Elizabeth Warren signed on!

“I don’t take a dime from lobbyists or PACs anyway,” Ro said. “I don’t
understand how you can take money from the biggest lobbying force against
the $15 minimum wage.”

“Ask the Senate why it didn’t pass, and they’ll tell you because the NRA
is lobbying against it, they’re lobbying specific senators,” he said.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1033&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]CALL YOUR REP!

★ ★ ★

STOP THE REVOLVING DOOR

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1034&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

It doesn’t stop at the ‘Other NRA’, Ro Khanna told our members. “Why don’t
we have Medicare for All, why aren’t there caps on insulin, why is there a
bloated defense budget — it’s the lobbying.”

There are more former members of Congress who are lobbyists than there are
members of Congress, which is why Rep. Khanna introduced legislation to
stop the revolving door.

He emphasized the importance of getting involved, speaking out, and taking
action with Our Revolution so we can be heard over the big money
interests.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1035&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

Our Revolution-NYPAN’s Jenny Almanzar spoke out at our One Fair Wage rally
in NYC about her experience in the restaurant industry. “I’ve come out of
shifts making less than the minimum wage,” she said. “Most workers there
have quit.”

We need to hear from you! If you’ve ever worked in the food service
industry and experienced low wages, we encourage you to speak out — we’ll
have your back!

Leaders like Bernie Sanders and Ro Khanna are bringing these issues to the
forefront, and we can help bring change by sharing our horror stories in
the industry.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/tipped_wage_sv/?t=1036&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]SHARE YOUR STORY

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1037&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

And, our Raise the Wage Team is getting stuff done! In just the past two
weeks, Our Revolution has worked with One Fair Wage to get bills on the
table in NY, MD, and CO — rallying and lobbying state lawmakers to stand
with workers!

Next up — MA, CT, RI, VT, HI, PR, and CA. And, we’re working now to put
higher wages on the ballot in AZ, OH, and MI in 2024. Sign up to help
millions of workers fight for the higher pay they deserve.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8222?t=1038&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]JOIN OUR RAISE-THE-WAGE TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1039&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

Medical Debt is a uniquely American problem among the so-called “developed
world" — and a big one that has been largely neglected by politicians and
the media.

Bernie put it into focus in his [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8290?t=1040&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]State of the Working Class, noting
half of all U.S. bankruptcies involve medical debt, and 38% of Americans
put off healthcare to avoid going into debt.

We’re compiling stories to bring pressure to bear on this great healthcare
injustice. If you are one of the many who owe money to a hospital, please
speak out.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1041&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]SHARE YOUR STORY

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1042&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

STAND WITH ILHAN

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1043&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

Republicans just doubled down on hatred, kicking US Rep. Ilhan Omar off
the Foreign Affairs committee.

Rep. Omar has dealt with a barrage of xenophobia and death threats for
years because of her Muslim background and willingness to stand up to the
worst abuses of the military-industrial complex.

The far-right has spent millions of dollars in campaign ads stoking fear
and division in an attempt to weaken our movement and sideline our
strongest allies.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8325?t=1044&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]Split a contribution with Our Revolution and Ilhan Omar to help fight
back against these far-right attacks.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1045&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

Our Revolution Ohio-backed Tara Mosley told us all about her race for
Mayor of Akron on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8322?t=1046&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]Organizing Call Monday.

Tara was a 2016 Bernie delegate and led Ohio for Bernie in 2020 and is now
in her third term as Akron City Councilor. She’s backed by Cornel West and
Danny Glover, and she’d be the first woman and first black mayor in the
city.

“I was also the only elected official in Akron who stood with Senator
Sanders when every other elected official stood with the establishment
candidate,” Tara said. “If I had to do it again, I would, a thousand times
over.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1047&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

Besides Akron, power is up for grabs in major cities across the country,
and we plan to put progressives at the helm in St. Louis, Chicago, NYC,
Philly, Nashville, Dallas, and more.

Join Our Revolution’s Elect Progressives Team to build local power in your
city or state — where policy changes can directly affect our lives!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1048&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1049&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

SINEMA OFFICIALLY HAS A CHALLENGER!

Progressive US Rep. Ruben Gallego is officially running against Kyrsten
Sinema for the US Senate in Arizona — and Our Revolution is all-in to make
sure the Senate has one less corporate villain.

Sinema stood in the way of higher wages, voting rights, lower drug costs,
and so much more. Yet, corporate Dems haven’t ruled out endorsing her for
2024, so we have work to do!

As she rakes in billionaire money, it’s going to take a historic
grassroots effort to win. Donate now to our Stop Sinema Fund to jumpstart
this work!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8291?t=1050&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]STOP SINEMA

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1051&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

ACTION FOR TYRE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1052&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

Last Saturday, Our Revolution NJ joined an emergency rally to demand
justice for Tyre Nichols, who was brutally killed by five police officers
in Memphis.

Activists called for civilian oversight of police, ending qualified
immunity and ending no-knock warrants, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8326?t=1053&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]NJ News 12 reported.

After pressure and outreach to bill cosponsors, the NJ team scored a
temporary victory when a regressive bill to create more mandatory minimums
was pulled from the committee this week, OR Organizing Coordinator
Anna-Marta Visky said.

At the federal level, US Rep. Ro Khanna [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8322?t=1054&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]told us Monday that he’s
reintroducing the Peace Act in the House. “This is about our law,” he
said. “Every other major western democracy says officers can’t use force
until the last resort.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1055&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1056&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

Join our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Broadcast for a discussion with US
Rep. Pramila Jayapal on the push for executive actions. It all kicks off
at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 CT next Monday (Feb. 13th).

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1057&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1058&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

As the country’s largest grassroots-funded progressive political
organization, we are carrying out Bernie’s vision through our
4-POINT PLAN TO WIN:

Organize the Grassroots
Elect Progressive Champions
Transform the Dem Party
Fight for Progressive Issues

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1059&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]As a Movement Builder, your recurring donation will give Our
Revolution the stability of resources to plan ahead as well as jump into
rapid response when needed. Thank you.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8320?t=1060&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1061&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_DONOR_20230204_1_1.jPwmlh&t=1008&akid=3965%2E5885482%2EPXzfY_ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Insider News from the Political Revolution! HEADLINES: Chairman Bernie | Ban Dark Money | Larry Cohen: Inside Strategy | State Party Wins! | Raise the Wage w/ Ro Khanna | Stand With Ilhan | Speak Out on Medical Debt | Action for Tyre Nichols | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] NEW STICKER! As the new Chairman of HELP (healthcare, education, labor, and pensions), Bernie Sanders is taking on corporate greed and Big Pharma is already fighting back. Claim your Chairman Sanders sticker with a one-time donation of $10 — or become a member with a $5 recurring gift to invest in our work to carry out Bernie’s vision. [ ]CLAIM YOUR STICKER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Join us Monday, Feb. 13th when US Rep. Pramila Jayapal will join our National Organize-to-Win Call to talk about what Biden can do with the power of the pen to advance our priorities. And, stay tuned for other special guests! [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ AN INSIDE LOOK AT OUR INSIDE STRATEGY [ ][IMG] Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen had [ ]choice words for the DNC ahead of today’s Winter Meeting in Philadelphia, where our growing progressive bloc is pushing to ban dark money from primaries. Larry, a longtime labor leader and party reformer, laid out the stakes on our [ ]National Organize-to-Win Call on Monday. “If we don’t get the dirty money out, it becomes increasingly impossible to elect the grassroots challengers,” Larry said. “It’s not just about the rulers, it’s also the rules.” “For those of us who believe we must fight in every possible way to advance progressive issues and win real power, we ignore party reform at our peril,” Larry wrote in [ ]In These Times. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Congratulations to two new progressive state party chairs: Shasti Conrad, a former Bernie staffer, was just elected Washington State Party Chair! And, union organizer Yolanda Bejarano won a contested race for Arizona State Party Chair! Yolanda had the backing of Ruben Gallego, who is challenging Kyrsten Sinema in 2024; and progressives swept 10 of the 10 seats they ran for on the AZ State Party Executive Board! “We now have a working progressive majority in the Arizona Dem Party, Our Revolution PDA-AZ Leader Dan O’Neal was excited to announce on our [ ]broadcast. “It’s all about winning and it’s all about power!” Progressives now hold leadership positions in 20 state parties, and we’re building out power state by state. [ ][IMG] We cannot cede this ground to the corporate wing. We will be fighting for progressive leaders in other state parties around the country in the coming months, like Nevada, Florida, and Oregon. Join our [ ]Party Transformation Team to root out dark money and help us grow and organize our ranks as a powerful force within the party! [ ]JOIN THE TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ RAISE THE WAGE [ ][IMG] On our [ ]National Organizing Call on Monday, Our Revolution super-member Ro Khanna spoke on our joint work to raise wages and laid out his vision for a new economic patriotism in America. As he wrote in [ ]Newsweek, this is a plan to bring back production and good jobs in America, working with labor, investing in our workforce, and rebuilding our communities. “We have a moonshot for economic renewal that is desperately needed,” he said. “And, it’s got to be coupled with Medicare for All, free public college, childcare... so people can afford to be part of the economy.” “It was Dr. King who said it was criminal to pay someone starvation wages, and here we are 50 years later,” Ro said. “No one should be making $2.13 on a tipped wage in modern-day America — that’s what Our Revolution and One Fair Wage are fighting against.” [ ][IMG] That’s right. We’re partnering with One Fair Wage to end the subminimum wage for tipped workers in 13 states — because feeding your kids shouldn’t depend on the kindness of strangers. Not only are we pressuring elected officials, but we’re also taking on the National Restaurant Association — exposed by the [ ]NYT for using $25M in workers’ own money to lobby against their wages! Our Revolution Maryland activists were featured protesting the ‘Other NRA’ [ ]in Bernie’s new video on our campaign to raise wages and not leave tipped workers behind! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] All elected officials must reject dirty money from ‘Other NRA’ which has used this scheme to stagnate the federal minimum wage at $7.25/hr since 2009 and the federal tipped wage at $2.13/hr since 1991! US Rep. Ro Khanna was the first to sign our NO NRA Money pledge, and others like Rep. Greg Casar and Sen. Elizabeth Warren signed on! “I don’t take a dime from lobbyists or PACs anyway,” Ro said. “I don’t understand how you can take money from the biggest lobbying force against the $15 minimum wage.” “Ask the Senate why it didn’t pass, and they’ll tell you because the NRA is lobbying against it, they’re lobbying specific senators,” he said. [ ]CALL YOUR REP! ★ ★ ★ STOP THE REVOLVING DOOR [ ][IMG] It doesn’t stop at the ‘Other NRA’, Ro Khanna told our members. “Why don’t we have Medicare for All, why aren’t there caps on insulin, why is there a bloated defense budget — it’s the lobbying.” There are more former members of Congress who are lobbyists than there are members of Congress, which is why Rep. Khanna introduced legislation to stop the revolving door. He emphasized the importance of getting involved, speaking out, and taking action with Our Revolution so we can be heard over the big money interests. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution-NYPAN’s Jenny Almanzar spoke out at our One Fair Wage rally in NYC about her experience in the restaurant industry. “I’ve come out of shifts making less than the minimum wage,” she said. “Most workers there have quit.” We need to hear from you! If you’ve ever worked in the food service industry and experienced low wages, we encourage you to speak out — we’ll have your back! Leaders like Bernie Sanders and Ro Khanna are bringing these issues to the forefront, and we can help bring change by sharing our horror stories in the industry. [ ]SHARE YOUR STORY ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] And, our Raise the Wage Team is getting stuff done! In just the past two weeks, Our Revolution has worked with One Fair Wage to get bills on the table in NY, MD, and CO — rallying and lobbying state lawmakers to stand with workers! Next up — MA, CT, RI, VT, HI, PR, and CA. And, we’re working now to put higher wages on the ballot in AZ, OH, and MI in 2024. Sign up to help millions of workers fight for the higher pay they deserve. [ ]JOIN OUR RAISE-THE-WAGE TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Medical Debt is a uniquely American problem among the so-called “developed world" — and a big one that has been largely neglected by politicians and the media. Bernie put it into focus in his [ ]State of the Working Class, noting half of all U.S. bankruptcies involve medical debt, and 38% of Americans put off healthcare to avoid going into debt. We’re compiling stories to bring pressure to bear on this great healthcare injustice. If you are one of the many who owe money to a hospital, please speak out. [ ]SHARE YOUR STORY ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ STAND WITH ILHAN [ ][IMG] Republicans just doubled down on hatred, kicking US Rep. Ilhan Omar off the Foreign Affairs committee. Rep. Omar has dealt with a barrage of xenophobia and death threats for years because of her Muslim background and willingness to stand up to the worst abuses of the military-industrial complex. The far-right has spent millions of dollars in campaign ads stoking fear and division in an attempt to weaken our movement and sideline our strongest allies. [ ]Split a contribution with Our Revolution and Ilhan Omar to help fight back against these far-right attacks. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution Ohio-backed Tara Mosley told us all about her race for Mayor of Akron on our [ ]Organizing Call Monday. Tara was a 2016 Bernie delegate and led Ohio for Bernie in 2020 and is now in her third term as Akron City Councilor. She’s backed by Cornel West and Danny Glover, and she’d be the first woman and first black mayor in the city. “I was also the only elected official in Akron who stood with Senator Sanders when every other elected official stood with the establishment candidate,” Tara said. “If I had to do it again, I would, a thousand times over.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Besides Akron, power is up for grabs in major cities across the country, and we plan to put progressives at the helm in St. Louis, Chicago, NYC, Philly, Nashville, Dallas, and more. Join Our Revolution’s Elect Progressives Team to build local power in your city or state — where policy changes can directly affect our lives! [ ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] SINEMA OFFICIALLY HAS A CHALLENGER! Progressive US Rep. Ruben Gallego is officially running against Kyrsten Sinema for the US Senate in Arizona — and Our Revolution is all-in to make sure the Senate has one less corporate villain. Sinema stood in the way of higher wages, voting rights, lower drug costs, and so much more. Yet, corporate Dems haven’t ruled out endorsing her for 2024, so we have work to do! As she rakes in billionaire money, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort to win. Donate now to our Stop Sinema Fund to jumpstart this work! [ ]STOP SINEMA ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ ACTION FOR TYRE [ ][IMG] Last Saturday, Our Revolution NJ joined an emergency rally to demand justice for Tyre Nichols, who was brutally killed by five police officers in Memphis. Activists called for civilian oversight of police, ending qualified immunity and ending no-knock warrants, [ ]NJ News 12 reported. After pressure and outreach to bill cosponsors, the NJ team scored a temporary victory when a regressive bill to create more mandatory minimums was pulled from the committee this week, OR Organizing Coordinator Anna-Marta Visky said. At the federal level, US Rep. Ro Khanna [ ]told us Monday that he’s reintroducing the Peace Act in the House. “This is about our law,” he said. “Every other major western democracy says officers can’t use force until the last resort.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Join our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Broadcast for a discussion with US Rep. Pramila Jayapal on the push for executive actions. It all kicks off at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 CT next Monday (Feb. 13th). [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As the country’s largest grassroots-funded progressive political organization, we are carrying out Bernie’s vision through our 4-POINT PLAN TO WIN: Organize the Grassroots Elect Progressive Champions Transform the Dem Party Fight for Progressive Issues [ ]As a Movement Builder, your recurring donation will give Our Revolution the stability of resources to plan ahead as well as jump into rapid response when needed. Thank you. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: _ Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

subject: We’re with Ilhan.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Republicans
kicking Ilhan Omar off of the Foreign Affairs Committee is nothing short
of racist, Islamophobic hypocrisy. It’s also a clear attempt to silence an
outspoken critic of human rights abuses and oppressive regimes worldwide.

Let us be clear: We unequivocally stand with Ilhan and will continue to
support her as she endures hate-filled, hypocritical attacks from the GOP.
We have her back as she stands-strong in the face of these ugly attacks:

[1]Ilhan Omar: "I will continue to speak for the families who are seeking
justice around the world— whether they are displaced in refugee camps or
hiding under their bed somewhere like I was. I didn’t come to Congress to
be silent. I came to Congress to be their voice."
This vote to oust Ilhan didn’t occur in a vacuum. Republicans, mega GOP
donors, Donald Trump, and others have been going after Ilhan and other
progressive women of color for years because they speak truth to power and
aren’t afraid to go up against the political status quo to stand up for
what’s right.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126129?refcode=em20230204-27374&t=1001&akid=27374%2E1203867%2E73vepJ ]We’re going to continue to fight to support and elect more leaders like
Ilhan Omar who truly represent the people. Will you contribute
$3 right now to support our work?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126129?refcode=em20230204-27374&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27374%2E1203867%2E73vepJ ]Contribute $3

Ilhan made history with her appointment to the House Foreign Affairs
Committee not just because of who she is, but what she did — challenge any
foreign policy that turns a blind eye to corruption or crime for the sake
of political interests.

Ilhan went up against the entire political establishment in DC. She
questioned war criminals and stood up for victims of violence across the
world — and she never backed down.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126129?refcode=em20230204-27374&t=1021&akid=27374%2E1203867%2E73vepJ ]We need more leaders like Ilhan in Congress. Please make your best
gift right now to help us recruit the next generation of Justice Democrats
to serve in Congress.

Together we will continue to work to transform the Democratic Party from
the inside out.

In solidarity,

Team JD

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230204-27374-footer&t=1022&refcode2=27374_1203867_73vepJ&akid=27374%2E1203867%2E73vepJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=27374%2E1203867%2E73vepJ

subject: BREAKING: Lemont Mayor John Egofske to Fill Jim Durkin’s Vacant House Seat
body:
Local Illinois Republican leaders from the 82nd House District have selected Lemont Mayor John Egofske to fill Jim Durkin's vacated House seat.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/6cb34b4753c1/breakinglemont-mayor-john-egofske-to-fill-jim-durkins-vacant-house-seat?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

BREAKING: Local Republican Leaders Select Lemont Mayor John Egofske, an Independent Who Endorsed Democrats, to Fill Jim Durkin’s Vacant House Seat (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/breaking-local-republican-leaders-select-lemont-mayor-john-egofske-an-independent-who-endorsed-democrats-to-fill-jim-durkins-vacant-house-seat.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Local Illinois Republican (https://www.cookrepublicanparty.com/durkin-announces-retirement-committee-created-to-appoint-replacement-for-illinois-82nd-legislative-district/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) leaders from the 82nd House District have selected Lemont Mayor (https://www.lemont.il.us/government/mayor-john-egofske?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) John Egofske to fill the vacant House seat left by former House Republican Minority Leader Jim Durkin, who resigned (https://www.cbsnews.com/chicago/news/illinois-house-minority-leader-jim-durkin-resigning/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and left office in early January.

Egofske was elected mayor of Lemont in 2017, and his party affiliation on the Illinois State Board of Elections website is listed as an Independent (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/CandidateDetailCD.aspx?ID=CatYq1BiVlmqbl87lxy0%2fg%3d%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/breaking-local-republican-leaders-select-lemont-mayor-john-egofske-an-independent-who-endorsed-democrats-to-fill-jim-durkins-vacant-house-seat.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

============================================================

In 2020, Egofske ** endorsed (https://www.politico.com/newsletters/illinois-playbook/2020/01/07/28-mayors-endorsing-lipinski-done-deal-to-replace-sandoval-bloomberg-rendezvous-488005?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Democratic US Rep. ** Daniel Lipinski (https://ballotpedia.org/Daniel_Lipinski?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
and on October 22, 2022, just weeks before the midterm election, Egofske endorsed Illinois Democratic State Rep. Larry Walsh, Jr., a member of Democratic House Speaker Chris Welch’s leadership team – where he serves as ** Downstate Caucus Whip (https://ilhousedems.com/project/rep-lawrence-walsh-jr/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, saying,

"Regardless of partisan politics, it's all about getting things done, and I have seen first hand that Larry Walsh Jr gets things done."

Sources confirm to Illinois Review that Durkin wrote a letter of support to the committee, expressing his support for Egofske to replace him in the Illinois House of Representatives.

In announcing the formation of the committee tasked with finding Durkin’s replacement, DuPage Republican Chairman Jim Zay said,

“Leader Durkin has been a tremendous advocate for our region and state, and we thank him for his extraordinary service. Our committee looks forward to a transparent and thorough process to fill this important position.”

In addition to Zay, the committee includes Tim Ozinga (Will Co.), Michael Shackel (Lemont Twp.), Terrance Carr (Lyons Twp.), Cindy Nelson Katsenes (Orland Twp.) and Sean Morrison (Palos Twp.).

The vote is weighted, with Zay's vote having the most influence on the committee (44%). Carr, 24%; Shackel, 22%; Ozinga, 4%; Katsenes, 3%; and Morrison, 2%.

During the Republican primary, Durkin, Morrison, Ozinga and Zay
** endorsed (https://www.politico.com/f/?id=0000017e-6d5c-dbc8-a1ff-7d7dbf990000&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Richard Irvin's campaign for governor.

But in previous elections, Irvin not only pulled
** Democratic Primary ballots (https://twitter.com/markmaxwelltv/status/1471589397552320517?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
in 2014, 2016 and 2020, but he also spent years ** praising Democratic Gov. JB Pritzker (https://twitter.com/demgovs/status/1483091889607909379?s=61&t=PRMWA5ZjyteefflEsOtYwQ&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
– referring to him as a “great friend and a great leader.”

And in 2020, Irvin attended a Black Lives Matter rally, yelling, “** I can’t breathe! (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QOyFraLPPLo&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
”

During the midterm election, Durkin suffered embarrassing losses, giving House Democrats once again, supermajority control in the Illinois House.

In media interviews after announcing his resignation as House GOP leader the day after the midterms, Durkin attempted to place all of the blame on the 45th President of the United States ** Donald Trump (https://www.chicagobusiness.com/politics/trump-blamed-illinois-gop-losses-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

“As long as we continue to say that we are the party of Trump and that we have to abide by the party principles in the platform, 100% we’re gonna continue down this path of losing."

When Durkin announced that he was resigning from his seat in the legislature in January, he once again blamed Trump for Illinois’ losses, saying,

“I hope that at some point in the near future, and I think we’re getting there, that the party breaks its fever of Donald Trump and understands and learns from the past. Some people will never get there.”

Durkin then suggested that pro-life and 2nd Amendment issues were “dragging” the Republican party down.

“So I would just say the sooner that the public realizes that he’s not value added to the Republican Party, we can start looking at what this party used to be about. A party that didn’t insist upon this purity test. A party that is a fiscally conservative first of all, certainly, but we can have a fair and respectful debate within the party on issues related to the Second Amendment, to life and these other social issues, that have been dragging us down in areas that we have to compete in — mainly the suburbs and the collar counties.”

In the last few months, ** Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-durkin-use-citizens-to-change-illinois-pac-to-support-gop-spokesman-during-primary-against-conservative-candidate.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
has published several articles about Durkin using his political influence to target conservative grassroots candidates during the Illinois Primary.

Sources also confirmed to ** Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/sources-il-gop-blames-jim-durkin-for-postage-discount-abuse-as-gop-faces-potential-postal-audit.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
that the IL GOP is blaming Durkin for the party’s postage discount abuse, where mailers “Paid for by the Republican Party of Illinois” were sent during the primary to viciously attack conservative Republican grassroots candidates that were challenging Durkin’s friends and political allies.

And in January, before he resigned from the legislature, Durkin was the only Republican to join the Democrats, ** voting (https://www.politico.com/f/?id=00000185-8628-de44-a7bf-ee3f47b80000&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
in favor of the ** assault weapons ban (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-il-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin-votes-with-democrats-to-ban-assault-weapons.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

Attorney and former Illinois Attorney General candidate Thomas DeVore has filed multiple lawsuits challenging the constitutionality of the assault weapons ban on the equal protection clause, and so far, Judges in ** Effingham (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-judge-rules-in-favor-of-former-ag-candidate-tom-devore-and-over-860-plaintiffs-halts-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
and ** White (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/breaking-white-county-judge-halts-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-cites-equal-protection-clause-in-another-blow-to-pritzker.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Counties, and the ** 5th District Appellate Court (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-appellate-court-affirms-devores-equal-protection-argument-assault-weapons-ban-temporary-restraining-order-effective-statewide.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
view the equal protection clause as the most credible argument in the case – and a literal “silver bullet” for DeVore and his plaintiffs.

In another blow to Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker’s assault weapons ban, and following the directive of the Appellate Court, White County Judge T. Scott Webb on Thursday granted DeVore’s motion for a temporary restraining order (TRO), halting the ban while the lawsuit proceeds.

The lawsuit raises the same claims as the one filed in Effingham County, where Judge Joshua Morrison granted the first TRO and names Gov. JB Pritzker, State Senate President Don Harmon, D, Illinois House Speaker Christopher Welch, D, and Attorney General Kwame Raoul, D, as defendants.

The lawsuit filed in White County by DeVore includes over 1,600 plaintiffs, including former Illinois State Senator and Republican nominee for governor ** Darren Bailey (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-attorney-tom-devore-darren-bailey-file-another-lawsuit-after-an-effingham-judge-issues-a-temporary-restraining-order-pausing-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
; 68 federal firearms dealers and covers 92 counties.

On Tuesday, 5th District Appellate Court ** affirmed (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-appellate-court-affirms-devores-equal-protection-argument-assault-weapons-ban-temporary-restraining-order-effective-statewide.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Effingham County’s TRO and goes beyond the original 866 plaintiffs in the original lawsuit, and is now binding against all courts statewide.
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Website (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ca679ae69e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_04_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ca679ae69e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: Susan Wild
subject: a quick note on the Council for a Livable World
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I was honored to receive the endorsement of the Council for a Livable World in the 2022 midterm election cycle, and I wanted to take a moment to tell you about their mission and critically important work.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58266039/390565564/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230204-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWVlYmI2ZC1hYWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tBO-w1lkxzjmg2RXRoa9ctd9xoADe3dUntZMOOHZkU4=)
---
| Peter,

I was honored to receive the endorsement of the Council for a Livable World in the 2022 midterm election cycle, and I wanted to take a moment to tell you about their mission and critically important work.

The Council’s chief goal is to reduce and eventually eliminate the threat posed by nuclear weapons. In pursuit of that goal, the Council works to elect candidates who support their mission, and then continues to support those members in Congress. Their agenda includes pushing for diplomacy-first foreign policy, nuclear arms control and common-sense defense spending in order to create a more livable world.

The ongoing war in Ukraine has once again made the threat caused by nuclear weapons all too clear, which is why the Council is circulating a petition to President Biden calling for continued negotiations for arms control agreements in the future. Even when it seems difficult, continuing negotiations with other nuclear-armed states is essential to our shared future. [_**Would you add your name to the petition to show your support for continued efforts to increase arms control agreements and prevent a new nuclear arms race?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58266040/390565565/-136693048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWVlYmI2ZC1hYWE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tBO-w1lkxzjmg2RXRoa9ctd9xoADe3dUntZMOOHZkU4=&emci=74f224d1-faa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=5eeebb6d-aaa4-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5543981)

The Council raised almost $1 million for 38 endorsed candidates this cycle and will support newly elected and re-elected candidates in the 118th Congress to advance these policy goals.

clean_body: I was honored to receive the endorsement of the Council for a Livable World in the 2022 midterm election cycle, and I wanted to take a moment to tell you about their mission and critically important work. | = | Peter, I was honored to receive the endorsement of the Council for a Livable World in the 2022 midterm election cycle, and I wanted to take a moment to tell you about their mission and critically important work. The Council’s chief goal is to reduce and eventually eliminate the threat posed by nuclear weapons. In pursuit of that goal, the Council works to elect candidates who support their mission, and then continues to support those members in Congress. Their agenda includes pushing for diplomacy-first foreign policy, nuclear arms control and common-sense defense spending in order to create a more livable world. The ongoing war in Ukraine has once again made the threat caused by nuclear weapons all too clear, which is why the Council is circulating a petition to President Biden calling for continued negotiations for arms control agreements in the future. Even when it seems difficult, continuing negotiations with other nuclear-armed states is essential to our shared future. | The Council raised almost $1 million for 38 endorsed candidates this cycle and will support newly elected and re-elected candidates in the 118th Congress to advance these policy goals. In addition to the petition, | Sincerely, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: United Rural Democrats
subject: The GOP has never been more divided, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Let's invest in rural America. | | | Hi Peter – In case you haven't been following the GOP's countless factions and partisan games, we wanted to break down the new Republican Party for you. As you know, Republicans have become more divided than ever. Democrats need all the support they can get to counter this polarization and bring the country together for progress on much-needed social reforms. **_[Will you chip in to help Democrats here?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gcf3ffKRt1JJS1luQH6BXmCRTwNgsa7efSqYhzwUJ9QwsTit2u_VxCVA8BYs7xK6ejTsO7_s2UU1SxvfKI6qfSBYZmC7WPue00RUimUjKWkskgjBoYVrQAllfAY708iEAcWtJ9UBvA70wRsYG5R1OG-E8N563wsyMGFs1Nn6RSmP8AhlOVLqaJsjDC1dNPi-lFsyZzI7XMMdsNWer4_v07bbwzquvoEE2dtch_QV5tU29jIFjHoQHRlvluw-ZBUkXrESjNmYoZFKg9jil7JCze4H56EK2cx7orkXXkOj6LwxyCXBoWIvJEfSC_oO_oaM-ztzQbp0V9Rj1mGm0e7nqCW2XSbZDQrZvglgia153DHc25NXypdI_-rgG_5YqldEfh/3tf/PAZyqgcYSlegzQQqKEWEzA/h0/0l1kwMCMMP8_ARHX5ySlEmXymum_CbVCSBmRiOABq6s) _** Let's break down the GOP's main factions:
1. **The moderates:** The dwindling group of quiet lawmakers have been largely outcast by their party. Just look at the number of former representatives who resigned or lost their races because they were too bipartisan or moderate last cycle.
2. **The conservatives** : The politicians who are playing both fields-pledging loyalty to Trump while also appearing as though they are promoting the "consensus" of the Republican Party.
3. **The Tea Party** : You've likely heard this name before. These are some of the most conservative members who promote their own ideology over the needs of the American people.
4. **Trumpians** : These are the politicians who have pledged loyalty to Trump above all else. They're loud, anti-establishment, and often attack other lawmakers on the basis of character assassinations or misinformation.

**The best way to counter these factions? Elect Democrats. Help us do just that in Rural America.** In 2022, United Rural Democrats helped elect many Democrats who will bring much-needed change to their communities. In 2023, we're focused on re-energizing voters and investing in the localized Democratic infrastructure. **[Investing in counties and small races will win back crucial seats, make changes in people's lives, and aid in bigger Democratic wins in 2024. clean_body: Let's invest in rural America. | | | Hi Peter – In case you haven't been following the GOP's countless factions and partisan games, we wanted to break down the new Republican Party for you. As you know, Republicans have become more divided than ever. Democrats need all the support they can get to counter this polarization and bring the country together for progress on much-needed social reforms. Let's break down the GOP's main factions: 1. The moderates: The dwindling group of quiet lawmakers have been largely outcast by their party. Just look at the number of former representatives who resigned or lost their races because they were too bipartisan or moderate last cycle. 2. The conservatives : The politicians who are playing both fields-pledging loyalty to Trump while also appearing as though they are promoting the "consensus" of the Republican Party. 3. The Tea Party : You've likely heard this name before. These are some of the most conservative members who promote their own ideology over the needs of the American people. 4. Trumpians : These are the politicians who have pledged loyalty to Trump above all else. They're loud, anti-establishment, and often attack other lawmakers on the basis of character assassinations or misinformation. The best way to counter these factions? Elect Democrats. Help us do just that in Rural America. In 2022, United Rural Democrats helped elect many Democrats who will bring much-needed change to their communities. In 2023, we're focused on re-energizing voters and investing in the localized Democratic infrastructure. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: Thank you, Peter, for your support. \-- United Rural Democrats United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand (via RBG)
subject: I’m officially running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
| I wanted to share this with you personally, friend:

**I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support today is so important.**

The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too.

But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign.

**So that’s what I’m asking of you today, folks. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority.**

[**Please, will you split $3 between my campaign and Ron Be Gone to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign to defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15396?t=7&akid=1675%2E564421%2ExPo4wr) I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic.

But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a permanent paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that.

**The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.** [**Please, will you split $3 between my campaign and Ron Be Gone to defend our Democratic Senate majority and make sure that I can keep fighting for you in the Senate?**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15396?t=9&akid=1675%2E564421%2ExPo4wr) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15402?t=15&akid=1675%2E564421%2ExPo4wr)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15403?t=16&akid=1675%2E564421%2ExPo4wr)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15404?t=17&akid=1675%2E564421%2ExPo4wr)
Thank you,

Kirsten
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

subject: Democrats continue to push out BAD bills
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Help us get the word out and submit your comments AGAINST these bad bills. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f1df16357f&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Peter,

**This week in Olympia, Democrats continue to push terrible bills that will increase taxes even further, further harm 'affordable housing' goals, and cement election fraud into Washington's elections.**

Along with their terrible bills, Democrats are ignoring bipartisan common-sense bills, along with Republican sponsored bills, that would help get our state moving in the right direction.

Republicans and Democrats have been able to come together to support bipartisan police pursuit reforms along with Emergency Powers reforms to bring back legislative oversight on the Emergency process. **These bills are being blocked by Democrat leadership - further proof that if our state is to champion bipartisanship, we need a Republican majority. **
---
| Instead, Democrats are fighting to implement bills like:
---
|
* **HB 1045:** Would establish a Universal Basic Income, aka free money, pilot program.
* House: [View bill ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e294f77ec2&e=6a281f566d)| [Submit a comment against](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=8a9066fbd9&e=6a281f566d)

* **HB 1220 / SB 5209:** [Making Voting Mandatory](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=46d6fcf115&e=6a281f566d): Would require anyone who is legally eligible to register to vote in Washington state to do so and submit a ballot.
* House: [View bill](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=311480954e&e=6a281f566d) | [Submit a comment against](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=07059fa812&e=6a281f566d)
* Senate: [View bill](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=2eb2e65c53&e=6a281f566d) | [Submit a comment against](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=13ef3d100c&e=6a281f566d)

| | Peter – The radical right has been trying to pass a national sales tax for years. But because it's a terrible idea, they've never gotten anywhere with it. Now, with Kevin McCarthy in charge, they're at it again. **Let's get one thing straight: Oregonians do not support a national sales tax, and we never will. Period.** In fact, _we've rejected sales tax at the ballot box nine times._ And as long as I'm in Congress, you can count on me to vote against it. Why? **A national sales tax is an attack on poor and working class families.** The Republican plan slaps a 30% tax on nearly all essential purchases – including hygiene products, food, clothing, and medicine. At the same time, the Republican plan _eliminates_ the estate tax, as well as tax on purchases of stocks, bonds, mutual funds, and investments. The result? The Brookings Institute ran the numbers and found that **the current Republican national sales tax plan would cause taxes to rise for 90% of all households. Only those in the highest 10% of incomes would really get a tax cut. Those in the top 1% would receive an average tax cut of over $75,000.** It's as simple as that, Peter: the national sales tax makes things even harder on the people who are struggling to make ends meet while handing a massive windfall to the wealthiest Americans. Simply put, it's a bad idea, just like it's always been, and if the radical right brings this to the floor, you can count on me to stand up for America's working families over billionaires like I always have. _Val_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | subject: Before you watch the #WFPSOTU response

body:
| | | Peter, In just 3 days, Illinois Rep. Delia Ramirez will deliver the Working Families Party 2023 State of the Union Response. As a freshman member of Congress, Delia’s probably a new face for many of you — **so we sat down with her to ask some questions to help you get to know her a little better:** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhkjyHYqt8H8hDV-_Pd8DlhN4z-pz9keHd1CtmEen-uqiNFsnOPUxNR1ZzFzUGqBhP0YvGzRAa4inpTMXpYkyvLI6HW4vXyE-8Xrg08GLnjABLJNvH1j0cIVRPBin7IsdmwPXCSmQU8vuvkTuxeOGa0W_gbIuuIjD_LnuC4l75t3ZrZY60n9obhF-FrGEShManmyTKJd8AbtuPBHODRywWCMw43Y-BjLYjZ9INImm3Y1-NB9Rue7VjyvqJ8asu-jkmCwppi3zPZCyK4psQnenWLQ6iXHjVaQoiQubsULchCYN/3tf/rxiKEPGrRMu2ZUjaCnLyJw/h0/AiMUAuAe_wY-N7Pp1fRsZam34gDG34ZepCgPp2_kFcg) [**Click here to watch our 60-second interview with Rep. Delia Ramirez, and then RSVP for the link to join our State of the Union****Watch Party and WFP****Response on Tuesday, February 7th****starting****at****8:45****PM ET/5:45 PM PT.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhkjyHYqt8H8hDV-_Pd8DlhN4z-pz9keHd1CtmEen-uqiNFsnOPUxNR1ZzFzUGqBhP0YvGzRAa4inpTMXpYkyvLI6HW4vXyE-8Xrg08GLnjABc-8eOqilKnYfRm-RF2DIfX5i1kSuC1nJP1E6KQ063GakIlFZ07IXjh-Ng_YOoIDC52Dfh2MLeMsLjZDUAApQDemUQCD9cLC7PLoN8zzEV720IkeEgb8Msk6mrDrGo1SfxjvX2O72OxAZGw3fhWQITKQo1a4NdHgFRQuDp-cvOdd08FbG5Omg7l4bqDRWnuWx/3tf/rxiKEPGrRMu2ZUjaCnLyJw/h1/YmH8ESthtIoV6QtBDwTRNtm1y4blDCwX9b4uNAD-mtU) **[Watch the video »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhkjyHYqt8H8hDV-_Pd8DlhN4z-pz9keHd1CtmEen-uqiNFsnOPUxNR1ZzFzUGqBhP0YvGzRAa4inpTMXpYkyvLI6HW4vXyE-8Xrg08GLnjABRwhdWTsagUvgdO4QtWHytB4v8NEnLh3RFKGD6EPR-hLV5gncahoJQK7aLRODzZSvLpEvF-gbq0e_vwCHjEJzHTwMT-aEL1gLQwGobqlNDIXFB9Rm9I17YZPCPHXk1u1d-fuDqQGm7mjEJZo8Bi3wRaqWv_S7Zz-_-lG7jpgWO2sHcegkVmMQTu0QnIuXKYbA/3tf/rxiKEPGrRMu2ZUjaCnLyJw/h2/uzOPTC8LJsmHjE_nvn6OpXWLwKSEKyjx6ANGfWPsEEk)** For us, Delia needs no introduction. We had her back when most people thought her bid to bring real representation to IL-03 stood no chance — and we've come a really long way since then. Delia first built a name for herself when she made Illinois the first in the nation to extend health coverage to undocumented seniors, and as the first Latina elected to Congress from the Midwest, she’s already in the history books. We're confident Delia will fight like hell in Congress for working people, and that it'll only make her that much more historic. [**Watch our 60-second interview with Delia, then RSVP to join us for the SOTU Watch Party and WFP Response to be delivered by Rep. clean_body: | | | Peter, In just 3 days, Illinois Rep. Delia Ramirez will deliver the Working Families Party 2023 State of the Union Response. As a freshman member of Congress, Delia’s probably a new face for many of you — so we sat down with her to ask some questions to help you get to know her a little better: For us, Delia needs no introduction. We had her back when most people thought her bid to bring real representation to IL-03 stood no chance — and we've come a really long way since then. Delia first built a name for herself when she made Illinois the first in the nation to extend health coverage to undocumented seniors, and as the first Latina elected to Congress from the Midwest, she’s already in the history books. We're confident Delia will fight like hell in Congress for working people, and that it'll only make her that much more historic. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Last year could’ve looked very different
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Peter — I’m doing everything I can to deliver tangible change for the American people and keep our country moving forward. Last year, we made momentous progress — from lowering the costs of goods and combating inflation to _finally_ passing the _Respect for Marriage Act_ to protect marriage equality, we got a lot done. **But let me be clear: none of this would be possible without your support.** This incredible grassroots team helped flip the Senate in 2020 and protect our majority in 2022. Peter, it’s safe to say that the past few years could’ve looked very different if it weren’t for our hard work. It’s hard to imagine what things would look like if Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans were in the majority — it certainly would be bad. Here’s the thing: if we’re going to continue delivering lasting results, protecting our reproductive rights, addressing the climate crisis, enacting voting rights legislation, and so much more, then we need to ensure we can protect our Senate majority in the next election. Mitch McConnell wants nothing more than to flip the Senate chamber, and he’ll spend whatever it takes to do so. To fight back and protect our majority, we’re going to need all hands on deck for the next two years. And that fight starts right now. **So, Peter, I’m asking: Can you pitch in $3 or more right now to help us build the resources it’ll take to win here in Wisconsin and keep the Senate majority out of Mitch McConnell’s hands? ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $3 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58268039/390572600/321909845?refcode2=test&amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230204_AM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzhmN2Y5Ny1iMGE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BCWcHgewyV9ft3oHepW5dMyOlfSzFzOatRLaGr4YvHs=)

subject: Watch me hold nothing back

clean_body: Hold the socialist clowns accountable >> | Friends, It is time we hold the Democrats accountable — especially Adam Schiff and Eric Swalwell — and I will not rest until all of the Radical House members’ lies surface. I had the opportunity to speak on the Ingraham Angle on Fox News to voice my opinion on the corrupt government and how Liberal clowns should not have access to our national security secrets. I respect Speaker McCarthy for keeping his word and booting Swalwell and Schiff off the House Intelligence Committee. We have two fewer Democrats off our backs but many more to go. | NOW MORE THAN EVER , we need your support to stop the Radical Left. As American citizens, we need to open our eyes to the lying, scheming socialists that are running our country into the ground. THEY NEED TO BE STOPPED, AND THEY NEED TO BE STOPPED NOW! I will continue to speak the truth until our country is rebuilt, and I will always stand up for those suffering under Democratic politicians who continue to destroy our way of life. If we don’t put an end to this, they will continue to cook up lies. We need to get out ahead of the Democrats before it is too late. Together we will bring back the country we once knew and loved! Sincerely, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Republicans are getting worried about Missouri.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
It’s only February and national Republicans are already on defense.
#
Peter,
It’s only February, but national Republicans are already starting to play defense in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race. **Here’s the situation:**
**LAST MONTH,** just hours after Lucas Kunce announced his campaign on January 6, the group responsible for electing Republicans to the Senate called Lucas “unhinged” for wanting to take on a coward like Hawley.
**THEN EARLIER THIS WEEK,** in a coordinated effort with DC special interests, that same GOP group launched another weird attack — criticizing Lucas, a man from mid-Missouri, for sounding like... a man from mid-Missouri. Later in the day, Hawley’s campaign even fundraised off it.
**AND YESTERDAY,** we learned that Republican National Committee chair, Ronna McDaniel, will travel to Missouri later this month to support Hawley + GOP candidates up and down the ballot.
**[FIGHT BACK NOW »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27700?refcode=em20230204-2807&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2807%2E614464%2E0FilLK)**
Hawley + the GOP insiders in DC know Lucas has what it takes to flip this Senate seat. That’s why they’ve already started trying to tear down Lucas and the record-breaking grassroots movement we’re building with him.
**We need to keep fighting back against whatever comes our way between now and Election Day** — and since Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, shady mega-donors, or Big Oil + Big Pharma execs, he needs your help to get it done. So Peter:
**[Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can right now so we’ll have the resources to stand up to Hawley and the national Republicans backing his campaign? Anything you can spare will play a critical role in electing Lucas to the U.S. Senate in 2024 and taking this seat back for everyday working people.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27700?refcode=em20230204-2807&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2807%2E614464%2E0FilLK)**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbd24266e75d48f1849fd0e94790ec0e&_e=-SJpg_7-Vw6pixeSXYiXkT1POuFzxlNP2WCLVxrlbYFv8nhtKzOUupYHwDm2ws9PE5HqdT4MRY7U3HiPqwkSNE0vaEr1fu3ah1yNos6KQ2VmLs4movOnSqC1097xd0J5-9zfwkbXZ-74EM8A-XcT02p2Io4Df8oPJt3T83cE1oMVvYHHzWNvR7V0pBb37bh5yTESwcEVnhAn_CmfYU11o0N--B6QTS2a5hYSRSN0mzbk6qDe5VLXWL09nFwWPgwIYoLq14zn2zAbHwqZNIZSpiz96aga1ZfsmOMd2fKE36ySxnYxhXrROAOntIDryw1r2RsbtTg96ZrVWmn43A4wG8OqDRiU0L3JS1OTt61M5yIbzGGV65u31-w-6DzcTe5MyUrDOimGm1fyah16EsZwvA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbd24266e75d48f1849fd0e94790ec0e&_e=-SJpg_7-Vw6pixeSXYiXkT1POuFzxlNP2WCLVxrlbYFv8nhtKzOUupYHwDm2ws9PE5HqdT4MRY7U3HiPqwkSNE0vaEr1fu3ah1yNos6KQ2VmLs4movOnSqC1097xd0J5-9zfwkbXZ-74EM8A-XcT02p2Io4Df8oPJt3T83cE1oMVvYHHzWNvR7V0pBb37bh5yTESwcEVnhAn_CmfYU11o0N--B6QTS2a5hYSRSN0mzbk6qDe5VLXWL09nFwWPgwI76BO41CRpWIJddFLintP01JVglznWdlaemNYVgJdfMYlrFcmXSlkjo9fwjbwdBZ3kOOMJ6KaOcXlK8ATstfRVkwDP_9A4XvJKC4DCWhgJllWzmOecCcdQYuthDT9W7jNWVmAAqFINvCZbalfY9m-Mw%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbd24266e75d48f1849fd0e94790ec0e&_e=-SJpg_7-Vw6pixeSXYiXkT1POuFzxlNP2WCLVxrlbYFv8nhtKzOUupYHwDm2ws9PE5HqdT4MRY7U3HiPqwkSNE0vaEr1fu3ah1yNos6KQ2VmLs4movOnSqC1097xd0J5-9zfwkbXZ-74EM8A-XcT02p2Io4Df8oPJt3T83cE1oMVvYHHzWNvR7V0pBb37bh5yTESwcEVnhAn_CmfYU11o0N--B6QTS2a5hYSRSN0mzbk6qDe5VLXWL09nFwWPgwIM9FTLaFF-V2kGxrMLo_YTF1Og1FYOUgEnWlnpQCwqdF-UBdBsUej1QxJiECchSqfP8QYAkdQjdVNmsq_vq-l0K4PQo6G_Iv3W_Oo9Nal1CBaJwhplnKw1Kv3EXttZb1yeAXhHE1NKgMmGM1LW-hzJQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Peter,

On Tuesday, President Joe Biden will deliver his second State of the Union address.

At his address, President Biden will discuss the accomplishments of his term so far – including historic legislation to invest in our infrastructure, reform gun safety laws, and lower the cost of prescription drugs. But, while we've made so much progress over the last two years, we still have a lot of work to do.

From lowering costs to making health care more affordable and defending reproductive rights, Kim is committed to working alongside the Biden administration on the issues that matter most to you. Now, she wants to hear from you.

clean_body: On Tuesday, President Joe Biden will deliver his second State of the Union address. Peter, On Tuesday, President Joe Biden will deliver his second State of the Union address. At his address, President Biden will discuss the accomplishments of his term so far – including historic legislation to invest in our infrastructure, reform gun safety laws, and lower the cost of prescription drugs. But, while we've made so much progress over the last two years, we still have a lot of work to do. From lowering costs to making health care more affordable and defending reproductive rights, Kim is committed to working alongside the Biden administration on the issues that matter most to you. Now, she wants to hear from you. | Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. name: Katy Personette
subject: The freedom to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
THIS is why the GOP is holding justice for survivors hostage.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58275415/390580172/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230204IDJustice_N_KP_90DO_6_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkYzQwNTUyLWI4YTQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4XxHJvkmkvrxH_p_5D5ka7ULpk7xrGW6yTyUm3pF3_A=)
| Fellow activist,

There is only one reason that legislation for survivor justice has been put on halt: to weaken the voices of young, immigrant, Black, Indigenous, and other people of color. The Republicans in Harrisburg have decided to hold justice hostage in exchange for more injustice.

As they appear poised to continue “holding the line” against basic decency indefinitely, it’s time we get into just how disastrous their voter ID amendment would be for the Commonwealth’s voting rights. **[The freedom to vote should not be limited by the color of one's skin, age, or how much money one makes. Will you pitch in $10 today to help us empower our communities and show the GOP that our voices _will_ be heard?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58275417/390580173/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230204IDJustice_N_KP_90DO_6_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkYzQwNTUyLWI4YTQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4XxHJvkmkvrxH_p_5D5ka7ULpk7xrGW6yTyUm3pF3_A=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58275418/390580174/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230204IDJustice_N_KP_90DO_6_A_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkYzQwNTUyLWI4YTQtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4XxHJvkmkvrxH_p_5D5ka7ULpk7xrGW6yTyUm3pF3_A=) Voting in the Commonwealth is already excessively difficult for those who work long hours, have limited access to transportation, or can’t take time off — to name just a few accessibility issues.

The fact that Republicans want to make voting even more difficult by requiring this particular obstacle is no coincidence: **According to the ACLU, up to 25% of voting-age African-Americans lack government-issued I.D., while only 8% of voting-age white Americans have the same issue.**

As a voting rights organization, the New Pennsylvania Project stands firmly against any restrictive voter ID laws as we know they would directly affect the communities we center in our work. Our mission is to expand the electorate to reflect the growing diversity of the Commonwealth, centering the very communities that have been historically disenfranchised and often ignored from the democratic process. This proposed Constitutional amendment would stand directly against that goal.

Black, Indigenous, and other people of color have fought for centuries for the freedom to vote, and we refuse to take any steps backward. **[Fellow activist, this amendment is about suppressing voters. We see this for what it really is, and we will not stand for it. body:
will you support Virginia Democrats today?

|
---
Derek, We have the chance to take the majority in the House of Delegates back this year, stop the rest of Glenn Youngkin’s legislative agenda in it’s tracks, and protect the rights we hold so dear from GOP overreach. **[Will you support Virginia Democrat’s efforts today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58289806/390599585/-1927976296?refcode=dpva-em-230204-tossups&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmFmYzllMS1lMmE0LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TAxFop1g39EKIFSHkLilKEOza3X3f4alAH0vw9FcApc=)** If you look at the precinct vote totals from 2021, _**ELEVEN**_ of the newly drawn House and Senate districts are toss-ups. From the Desk of Senator Chase
---
