name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8121883420ac4f86b035b8cc55623a2a&_e=Aoe-K3EbG5dVeIEBer0mMVqpTaN5XVtqrKzt6G47bT46DtEL9y-aabNJEWH2wH8rcFTtMarRxJO4LpZ7251xg-Q33RCAv4rPGi3Q6JXWhMIztackni43Ptn7Wy5AfzVD6HvI9DsuVn9xj7AgTihk5os8dmV5KCZSukAQ_5T8SC8yNEkhG9wTeo_Dbmh8a2ngNZBpUxl7-GpJ-6ms-AHdTSomCQIFtQkg1cR6UxB53JNxD20tqsZn7YKLIePn53aKzOGj-xtmW1rLeL2mUVZP5GcB4bCMXTxDnf7a-xc5Y1kE3ZdCmXcc6wBRBxcmmaOZyrpnRkUSyWTvN-fmKkYwUoFfWcYvIfxwV2Su-Lp278CvaDQNktCdGKPLa50apUFVOhdi3vj3yPnMtzxry97IrA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8121883420ac4f86b035b8cc55623a2a&_e=Aoe-K3EbG5dVeIEBer0mMVqpTaN5XVtqrKzt6G47bT46DtEL9y-aabNJEWH2wH8rcFTtMarRxJO4LpZ7251xg-Q33RCAv4rPGi3Q6JXWhMIztackni43Ptn7Wy5AfzVD6HvI9DsuVn9xj7AgTihk5os8dmV5KCZSukAQ_5T8SC8yNEkhG9wTeo_Dbmh8a2ngNZBpUxl7-GpJ-6ms-AHdTSomCQIFtQkg1cR6UxB53JNxD20tqsZn7YKLIePn53aKhGvaAp4dRr5zHuh2vpvIREIYJz9mMm5TDoAQOKTT29EbDWuG_2mz1ctOpKyP8bqsHZW-PJHTyE294q39vmZzcJQ5f--Bed7HLzjeGttN0yEyli8u7mVyk4Z6IZxo7xcqH2NumUVKTgfAYaHFUrbOpQ%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8121883420ac4f86b035b8cc55623a2a&_e=Aoe-K3EbG5dVeIEBer0mMVqpTaN5XVtqrKzt6G47bT46DtEL9y-aabNJEWH2wH8rcFTtMarRxJO4LpZ7251xg-Q33RCAv4rPGi3Q6JXWhMIztackni43Ptn7Wy5AfzVD6HvI9DsuVn9xj7AgTihk5os8dmV5KCZSukAQ_5T8SC8yNEkhG9wTeo_Dbmh8a2ngNZBpUxl7-GpJ-6ms-AHdTSomCQIFtQkg1cR6UxB53JNxD20tqsZn7YKLIePn53aKcbXrz0X-Z_r0ByC9e3mG3G4tvzCy6bHvvVV5qdFoK6yR__Q6FwgnNppPfZhCViEmR77asARNIaBYCmP6INuKyVwfCCCZGzVNmHS9YRhkm4iQHVEfi-ywqFydkXHIwjJDnsRNxrmOvIQcqkN35sykwg%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! clean_body: What do you say... | | | Friend, Earlier this week, I commissioned a survey for grassroots supporters like you to help determine the location of my very first rally of the 2024 campaign. There’s just one problem: so many supporters from all across the country asked me to make their home our FIRST stop – and it was simply too close to call among so many great states. So, I have one final proposition... Whichever state provides the largest SURGE of grassroots contributions before midnight tonight to our Rally Across America Fund WINS! | Our amazing rallies have always served as a reminder of America’s spirit – and the dedication of grassroots patriots like you. While Biden and Kamala continue to run our country into the ground, we need to remind every last American just how GREAT we can truly be. That’s why I’ve never been more energized than RIGHT NOW to hold the largest rallies we’ve ever done. But that all starts with making sure our FIRST giant rally of the campaign is in the perfect location. And I want YOU to play a pivotal role in that effort, Friend. | Thank you, | Donald J. | | **FIRST:** This grassroots team powered state Democrats to victory last November, flipping four chambers, defending our majorities, and securing three new Democratic trifectas. **THEN:** Democrats FLIPPED a seat in the Virginia Senate against the odds – after Republicans poured a monumental _six figures_ into the race. **AND NOW:** Democrats are facing over a dozen more must-win special elections – some of which could determine control of entire chambers. With this many special elections already on the books, we need **16 Democrats in your community to step up _today_ so that we can compete against Republicans’ outsized spending in these elections.** If we lose even one seat, we risk our ability to stop state Republicans’ extremist agenda. **By becoming an official member of this grassroots team with a gift of $10 or more, you’re powering our work AND NOW: Democrats are facing over a dozen more must-win special elections – some of which could determine control of entire chambers. With this many special elections already on the books, we need 16 Democrats in your community to step up today so that we can compete against Republicans’ outsized spending in these elections. name: Larry Cohen
subject: join our team to transform the Democratic Party!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
An inside look at our inside strategy.

Hi Peter Willis,

I’m writing to tell you about the major work we’re doing to transform
politics and the Party. The DNC is holding its first full meeting of the
year this weekend, and Our Revolution is ready: mobilizing the growing
block of progressive members to ban dark money from primaries and win
other vital reforms.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8319?refcode=OR_EM_FR_12MU_20230204_1_2&t=1009&akid=3968%2E5885482%2EEvYL3H ]Dark money groups are gearing up to fight back, and we need your help.
Join Our Revolution's Transform the Party team by clicking here to commit
$5 a month to fund this critical work!

While Republicans now control the U.S. House, we’re not slowing our
efforts to transform U.S. politics. This includes building progressive
majorities in state-level parties and changing internal rules to ban dark
money in primaries.

The most dramatic gains over the past year can be seen in the growth of
the Congressional Progressive Caucus (CPC). After the 2022 midterms,
thanks to organizing by Our Revolution and our allies, the caucus now
claims an all-time high of 103 members — nearly half of all House
Democrats.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8319?refcode=OR_EM_FR_12MU_20230204_1_2&t=1010&akid=3968%2E5885482%2EEvYL3H ]Our Revolution has made significant progress, but with corporate
Democrats having access to unlimited big money, we need to keep pushing.
Can I count on you to donate just $5 a month to become an official member
of our Transform the Party team?

Internal CPC rules reform has helped discipline and unify the caucus as a
bloc to counterbalance the power of corporate Democrats. Along with such
policy wins as including $1,400 stimulus checks and expanded unemployment
benefits in 2021's American Rescue Plan, the CPC has helped shape the
Democrats' national priorities under the leadership of Rep. Pramila
Jayapal.

Party reform is also growing at the state level. Thanks in part to Our
Revolution's organizing, 20 states now have progressive reformers serving
in top elected leadership positions, and often as party chairs. As a
result, the Democratic National Committee (DNC) now boasts its largest
progressive faction in decades.

Progressives won big in Party elections last weekend with my union sister
Yolanda Bejarano winning a contested race to become the new Chair of the
Arizona Democratic Party — and our candidates swept 10/10 executive board
seats!

State party elections will be held this month in California, Washington,
and Iowa, — and progressives are expected to do well. State parties can
adopt their own platforms and rules for nominating candidates.
Collectively, they can have a major impact on the orientation of the
national party and its rules, including party positions on key issues as
well as the presidential nominating process.

This year, DNC reformers (including myself) have again submitted a
resolution banning dark money in Democratic primaries. (We unsuccessfully
submitted a similar resolution in 2022.) The DNC and Democratic state
parties around the country also have extensive rules relating to the
nominating process, which provide many opportunities to block dark and
dirty money.

Independent expenditures targeting progressive candidates in Democratic
primaries skyrocketed in 2022, part of a broader campaign to trounce
challengers in the party. For example, millions of dollars were spent to
defeat Rep. Andy Levin (D-Mich.) in a paid media blizzard which helped
lead to his loss to corporate Democrat Haley Stevens.

Similarly, progressive challengers like Nina Turner in Ohio and Jessica
Cisneros in Texas fell short after facing massive expenditures for paid
media designed to terrify the public and increase turnout from
unaffiliated (and even Republican) voters.

One of the leading culprits behind this dark money effort was Sam
Bankman-Fried, CEO of crypto firm FTX, who is now facing a long prison
sentence for illegally using billions of dollars of customer deposits. His
expenses included nearly $40 million in contributions to national
Democratic organizations and independent expenditures to elevate corporate
candidates in their primaries.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8319?refcode=OR_EM_FR_12MU_20230204_1_2&t=1011&akid=3968%2E5885482%2EEvYL3H ]Getting this corrupt corporate cash out of primaries is critical if we
want to elect grassroots challengers running for office. Join our
Transform the Party Team with a donation of $5 a month to help us take on
big money!

What happens inside the Democratic Party and inside party caucuses of
elected Democrats is frequently ignored by progressives, who are generally
more comfortable protesting and working solely outside the party. Of
course, protest is essential, and new party-building is fine.

But for those of us who believe we must fight in every possible way to
advance progressive issues and win real power, we ignore party reform at
our peril, even as we demand broader electoral reforms, such as fusion and
ranked-choice voting, proportional representation, and more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8319?refcode=OR_EM_FR_12MU_20230204_1_2&t=1012&akid=3968%2E5885482%2EEvYL3H ]It's the rules and not just the rulers that determine much of our
political success. Our Revolution is leading this fight for fair rules,
and you can join us as an official member of our Party Transformation Team
by pitching in $5 a month!

When we organize, we win.

Larry Cohen
Board Chair
Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=OR_EM_FR_12MU_20230204_1_2.piisNf&t=1001&akid=3968%2E5885482%2EEvYL3H ]Our membership card

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=OR_EM_FR_12MU_20230204_1_2.M6M5cd&t=1002&akid=3968%2E5885482%2EEvYL3H ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing as a 2023 Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $10 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=OR_EM_FR_12MU_20230204_1_2.Xxbw0O&t=1003&akid=3968%2E5885482%2EEvYL3H ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=OR_EM_FR_12MU_20230204_1_2.v7i17p&t=1004&akid=3968%2E5885482%2EEvYL3H ]GIVE ONCE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1005&akid=3968%2E5885482%2EEvYL3H ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1006&akid=3968%2E5885482%2EEvYL3H ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1007&akid=3968%2E5885482%2EEvYL3H ][IMG]

Don't live in Pennsylvania? [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Update_Information?t=1008&akid=3968%2E5885482%2EEvYL3H ]Click here to update your address so
that we only send you the most relevant organizing opportunities.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=3968%2E5885482%2EEvYL3H

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

Joe has worked so hard for us, and now's our chance to give his historic address an even BIGGER audience than any of Trump's speeches!
